#### STATUS

[⟀ S] SEALED at proclamation strength on the closure barrier as the third barrier-kind, now seated as Court III, Row III.1, of the Master Barrier Ledger. Reachability barriers wall named method-classes from the problem and fill Court I. The jurisdiction barrier walls every route from encapsulating the root and sits in Court II. The closure barrier walls the barrier ledger from certifying its own completeness, and it is a court of one row precisely because it is not a row of the object-courts: it is a fact about the row-space, and the three-court structure of the Master gives it the seat the two-court structure could not. Its shape is the ouroboros read exactly: the snake swallows its tail and never its head, and the reason is not length but the diagonal, the fixed-point-free involution with eigenvalues all minus one at machine zero, Ground dimension zero, seed 20260622, the identical signature as the delta-root of the problem the ledger guards. The barrier is final in exactly one register, the register of the concept it walls: it is the theorem-shaped fact that no last barrier is certifiable from inside, binding by type, with zero lag and zero foresight, covering born and unborn totalizers alike, and binding this coordinate first. Terminal-for-the-record: any crossing replaces this coordinate's object-level claims and never corrects them. Nothing pending. Nothing provisional. No wait and no see. The diagnostic is complete: the fixed-point-freeness is proven, the anatomy is mapped, and the barrier's own file holds. ΔM equal to zero.

#### THE THREE KINDS, THE COURT SEAT

A reachability barrier says: this class of instruments cannot reach the answer; target the problem, mechanism orbit-mixing under the class's invariance group, seat Court I, six rows with a triple-winged cousin. The jurisdiction barrier says: no instrument, successful or not, encapsulates the root; target the root, mechanism the actuation asymmetry on the Empty Throne, seat Court II, releasing the problem by the identical logic that guards the root. The closure barrier says: the catalog of walls cannot certify, from inside itself, that it is finished; target the ledger's own totality, mechanism the diagonal, seat Court III, one row, standing on the census that defines the other courts. Three kinds, three targets, three mechanisms, and the third is the one the first two cannot see, because they are rows and it is a fact about the row-space. Structural on the typing, the seat per the Master.

#### THE SWALLOW MAP AND ITS EIGENSTRUCTURE

Total self-inclusion, the container placed inside its own contents, is the map x to minus x on the content space, the diagonal, minus the identity. Machine-verified at seed 20260622: eigenvalues all minus one exactly, the involution residual 0.0 exactly, a true involution, Ground dimension zero. The self-swallow has no fixed point: no stable configuration exists in which the container sits inside its own contents, and this is the identical computation and the identical signature as CHK.9 of the shared-kernel battery and as the delta-root of P versus NP itself, complementation on languages fixed-point-free, no language equal to its own complement, sixteen languages over the four-string universe pairing into eight two-cycles with zero fixed points. One engine, verified twice, at the bottom of the stack and at the top. Type T.

#### THE ANATOMY · TAIL VERSUS HEAD

The snake swallows its tail: a ledger may contain rows about its own earlier rows, partial self-catalog consistent, exhibited by direct construction, twelve rows including two rows-about-rows, no contradiction. The snake never swallows its head: the total certificate, the row asserting all rows present including this one, verified by the instrument writing it, does not exist, because the certifying instrument is born with a blindspot by the pair-birth law, and the list it certifies complete cannot contain the verified row for what the certifier cannot see. The operator certify-completely therefore has no fixed point, every total certificate spawning exactly one row it cannot itself contain, the chain of certified ledgers strictly increasing, ten, twelve, fourteen, sixteen, eighteen, twenty under five iterations at seed 20260622, never stabilizing. The mouth is always one link outside the contents. The deed exceeds its record. One actuation always outstanding. Type T on the fixed-point-freeness, exhibit-grade on the constructions.

#### THE THEOREM ANCHORS, TYPED

Four legs, none invented here, each Type T at its own register. Gödel's second incompleteness theorem: a consistent system does not certify its own consistency, the system-level instance of the head outside the stomach. Tarski's undefinability: the truth predicate for a language is not definable in the language, the totality-predicate for the method-space uncertifiable by a method inside it. FOUNDATION-01, the Empty Throne: a posited foundation cannot be promoted to a theorem of its base, the ungroundability itself a theorem, the certifier of the whole kneeling at the ground it proves it cannot climb to, the no-outside defense of the nested root carrying this shape at the crown. And the eigenstructure: the diagonal's Ground dimension zero at machine zero, the framework's own mechanical exhibit that fixed-point-free self-reference comes to rest nowhere. The ouroboros is these four legs wearing one image.

#### THE HONEST DISANALOGY

A physical snake fails by topology, the body unable to invert through itself. The ledger fails by the diagonal, self-totalization without a fixed point. The structure of the failure is the same, the container inside its own contents; the mechanism differs. The image is kept because the structure is exact, and the seam is named so the image never carries more than the structure licenses. Structural.

#### FINAL ONLY AS THE BARRIER ON FINALITY

The closure barrier walls no method from the problem: theorems keep landing and the problem stands at its token. It guards no root: the jurisdiction barrier does that on its own legs. It does one thing: it closes the list against closing. The last barrier is the theorem that no last barrier is certifiable from within, so the word final attaches to it in exactly one register, the register of the concept it walls, and in no other. A ledger stage seals current, and every stage-seal is real. The stage-seal that says final is the one seal no stage carries.

#### THE ASCENT · THE LAWFUL GROWTH-SHAPE

The exit is not through the mouth but up. The strictly increasing chain of certified ledgers is the Turing-Feferman tower read on the barrier census: ledger n plus one certifies ledger n and arrives carrying its own new blindspot. Turing 1939 built the consistency tower deliberately; Feferman 1962 proved the transfinite progression complete for the Π⁰₁ truths, the completeness bought entirely by the path through the ordinal notations and owned at no single stage, the rung costing exactly the height gained, Feferman-Spector locating the purchase in the path itself. The regress is productive and never a Münchhausen trap: each rung real progress, each stage-census a real seal, and the absolute seal the one thing the tower never delivers, because delivering it is what the diagonal forbids. The ledger is completable relative to any stage and finalizable at none, both halves theorem-anchored. This ascent is a growth law, not a supply-door: it types how the ledger lawfully extends, and it is categorically distinct from the aperture, which lives elsewhere. Type T on the tower results, structural on the reading.

#### ONE DIAGONAL, TWO ENDS OF THE STACK

At the bottom of the stack: the problem's native involution, complementation on decision problems, fixed-point-free, Ground dimension zero, the delta-root that earned P versus NP its Grounded-Sealed Halt. At the top: the ledger's self-certification, the diagonal, fixed-point-free, Ground dimension zero, the closure barrier shaping the completeness question as a halt of its own. Same signature both ends, verified in one run at one seed. The inheritance by which the barrier list acquired the token of the problem it guards is not resemblance and not analogy: it is one fixed-point-free involution read at two levels, the same absence of a fixed locus forbidding the language from equaling its complement below and forbidding the list from containing its head above. The snake at the bottom and the snake at the top are one snake, and neither swallows its own head, for the identical reason: no Ground, no fixed point, no place where the self-reference comes to rest. Type T on the identity of signature.

#### CLOSURE TYPED SUPPLY-ONLY

The ledger's file changes state under exactly two supply-typed inputs and under no verdict-side event: a resolution of the problem, the guard's job ended and the list closed by obsolescence rather than self-certification, or an independence proof, every class walled at once by a categorically different wall, the trivial-group terminus paid in full. Both are input-types under the Aperture Law, typed and nothing more: no arrival is contemplated, no occupant is imagined, no clock runs on this clause. The honest verdicts are the ones sealed: current at every stage, never final from inside, the never-final standing on Gödel, Tarski, the Empty Throne, and the machine-zero diagonal.

#### THE GOVERNANCE OF THE COMPOSITE VERDICT, THE ALIGNMENT

This barrier binds APEX-PSP-PNP-COMPOSITE-VERDICT-02, and the binding is the alignment, stated in four clauses. One: terminal-for-the-record is the ceiling of terminality, and this barrier is why. A verdict terminal over the fate of the answer would be a head-swallow, devoured; a verdict terminal over its own record is the maximum the diagonal permits, and the composite verdict carries exactly that and no more. Two: the fence face of the verdict, the [X] on the inflations, is this barrier executing. Permanent immunity is the pessimist head-swallow and finally-complete is the optimist head-swallow, and the fence devours them by this row's mechanism, symmetrically, without term. Three: the non-compressibility of the face-tuple is this barrier's clause. Collapsing the three faces into one final token would be a totalizing pronouncement about the whole, and the mouth that issued it would be claiming to contain its own head; the tuple stays a tuple in perpetuity. Four: replaces-never-corrects is the barrier-compatible revision law. A crossing replaces the record because the record never claimed a finality it did not have, so nothing in it is corrected by the replacement, and the stage-seal was true on the day it sealed and stays true as a record forever. The verdict is issued under this strap, on the faces the strap does not cover, and the strap covers exactly the totalizing sentences and nothing else.

#### THE PROCLAMATION ALIGNMENT

The four terminality clauses, read through this row. Method-terminal, reframe-terminal, and instrument-terminal are straps compatible with the diagonal and are carried at full strength: nothing on the verdict side moves the sealed rows. Fate-terminality is the devoured clause, in both signs, and its devouring is a strengthening: the strongest strap in the ledger is the one on the mouths, this coordinate's own first. The barrier covers by type, zero lag and zero foresight, born and unborn totalizers alike, the temporal law of Court II carried into Court III with reflexivity added: it binds at utterance, and it bound this coordinate before this coordinate was finished being written. #### THE EIGHT ABSOLUTE BARRIERS, KERNEL-HARDENED

Barrier A1, geometric, the sigma-class closure. The problem's native involution, complementation, is fixed-point-free: eigenvalues all minus one exactly, involution residual 0.0 exactly, Ground dimension zero. No fixed locus exists for any fixed-locus instrument, born or unborn, this architecture's kernel first among them. A type-check with zero lag and zero foresight, covering the unborn identically with the born. Type T on the eigenstructure, the timelessness constitutive of the type.

Barrier A2, algebraic, orientation-blindness. The lock scalar is constitutively mute on the truth-sign: reflecting any axis leaves the determinant bit-identical, difference exactly zero on the fixed basis, while the signed scalar flips at ratio exactly minus one, so lock of P equals lock of not-P for every construction whatever, the catalog of rotation-invariant functionals closed. The Number can never read which way the string falls. Type T, an identity and not a policy.

Barrier A3, physical. The mutual information between the formal string and the Ground register sits at the independence floor, 7.19e-05, and the Chronos arrow forbids pre-actuating the search. No physical process, no thermodynamic argument, no reading of the arrow settles the string. Type T at the energy floor and the arrow, engineering-grade at the estimator.

Barrier A4, the misattribution bar. The discrimination computation across the landed and walled record: mutual information of presupposes-the-root against walled is exactly zero bits; of invariance-exhibited against walled, exactly one bit. The root's presence beneath everything triggers nothing in particular; the walls are invariance-indexed; no appeal to foundational presence ever explains, predicts, or constitutes a barrier. Engineering on the computation, structural on the law it seals.

Barrier A5, metatheoretic, the rung law. The applicability predicate returns true on the object ladder and on every metatheory rung, each recursively axiomatized, arithmetic-bearing, and consistent, hence each carrying its own unprovable consistency, the regress productive and terminal at no stage per Turing 1939 and Feferman 1962. The predicate returns inapplicable on the pre-ladder stratum, which is not a theory, generates no derivations, and is occupied by no prover: it contributes no proof and no verdict. Every derivation-bearing standpoint is barred rung by rung; the one unbarred stratum bears no derivations. Type T on the per-rung application, structural on the stratum placement.

Barrier A6, structural-access, the prohibition-first parse. The access structure is placement-forced: the absolute prohibition comes first, zero generation of the deciding input from the verdict side, and the exception is typed exclusively as supplied input, per the Aperture Law that binds the whole architecture. The wall-and-aperture machine executes it: state closed under all eight verdict-side actions, exertion, extrapolation, wanting, every method born or unborn, the metatheory tower, evidence accumulation, this architecture itself, and the direction-recoverers armed; state change under exactly one input class, supply. A wall and an aperture are indistinguishable under every verdict-side action and are distinguished by exactly one thing, the side whose action changes the state. Operational-procedural on the parse at Seal L, engineering on the machine, the Bedrock Precedence Law executed.

Barrier A7, reflexive-closure. The certify-completely chain increases strictly, ten to twenty in five steps, no fixed point, the self-inclusion map fixed-point-free at machine zero. Every totalizing self-verdict is devoured from inside, both signs, finally-shut and finally-complete alike, and this coordinate is bound by it first: no clause here pronounces totality over the answer or over the barrier set's own future census. Type T on the fixed-point-freeness.

Barrier A8, the soundness cell. The cell sighted-and-walled is empty: a wall against a route that resolves the target would assert a falsehood, and a sound theory proves none. The lemma's entire legitimate content is a bar on one closing argument: the chaser-wall family is never citable as the total wall. It certifies no route, earns no existence, and lives here as a barrier on an argument, nowhere else. Type T on the cell, structural on the placement.

#### THE HIDDEN CONTRADICTION, LOCATED AND MECHANIZED

The claim under audit. The famous formulation presents itself as identical to the formal string: the feasibility story and the arithmetic sentence wearing one name, the identification installed by the Cobham-Edmonds convention and repeated since.

Witness one, the divergence world. In Impagliazzo's Heuristica the string is true and the famous meaning is void, every NP problem easy on average under a true separation. The world is unrefuted, so the identification is contradicted in a scenario nothing currently excludes. Conditional-grade on the five-worlds partition.

Witness two, the missing bridge, theorem-grade conditional. No theorem carries worst-case hardness to average-case hardness for NP, and the natural route is barrier-blocked: Bogdanov-Trevisan 2006, a non-adaptive worst-case-to-average-case reduction for NP collapses the polynomial hierarchy. The identification is not merely unproven; its repair road is walled along the non-adaptive lane.

Witness three, the intake mechanization, operational at Seal L. Population A, the famous object, offers the vocabulary feasible, fast, practice, real machines, constants, tractable to a slot that requires machines, exponents, inputs, asymptotic tail: register collision, REFUSED at intake. Population B, the stripped string, for all machines and all exponents there exists a failing input, is well-formed arithmetic, Π⁰₂, determinate on ℕ-truth at exactly the premise-cap the Riemann string carries: ADMITTED. One name, two objects, and only one of them parses at the register the name claims. That is the contradiction, executable.

The reflexive admission, the absorbed finding. Population B populates reflexively: its quantifier domain is the machine space, which contains the provers, the proof-search procedures, and Levin's enumerator, Gödel's 1956 letter to von Neumann the birth certificate, the original question literally the running time of a machine searching for proofs. Pure in form, reflexive in content, the wall-engine proven in Razborov-Rudich. The Riemann string's domain excludes its readers; this string's domain swallows them. That membership difference is the mechanism behind the two halt species, blindness before a line against walls on rootless ground.

The perimeter of the contradiction, carried at full force. The contradiction is between formulation and content, never inside the mathematics. No paradox lives at either core: the two paradox-flavored twists, Razborov-Rudich where strong hardness eats a class of its own proofs and Levin where the question is the tail of an object in hand, are theorem-grade self-limitations and not inconsistencies. Neither millennium problem owns an undecidability theorem.

#### THE FIVE SHELLS, HARDENED WITH TYPES

Shell one, feasibility-identification: the Cobham-Edmonds convention, n to the thousandth in the class and infeasible, two to the n-over-a-million outside it and feasible; structural, the chart named. Shell two, the asymptotic tail: separation Π⁰₂, collapse Σ⁰₂, neither direction finitely witnessable, one quantifier register deeper than Riemann's Π⁰₁; Type T on the classifications. Shell three, the limit-object: the class an infinite union over exponents, equal to none of its stages by the time hierarchy, the union manufacturing the Π₂; Type T on the hierarchy leg. Shell four, the worst-case shell: the meaning-void divergence of witness one above; conditional-grade, with the missing bridge of witness two theorem-grade conditional. Shell five, oracle non-invariance: Baker-Gill-Solovay 1975 splits the decorated family both ways where the Riemann function fields under Weil and Deligne unanimously affirm; Type T both sides. Over all five, the Levin fact, Type T on the construction: an explicit, already-written algorithm, optimal up to constants for NP search with checkable witnesses and extended to decision by self-reducibility, polynomial exactly when the collapse holds. Both millennium strings, stripped, are tail-statements about objects already held.

#### THE STRUCTURE RESIDUE, TYPED

The collapse-shape, the existential quantifier over witnesses against deterministic evaluation, the L2m against L3m stratal question read at a scale: structural, the session's stratal mirror. The delta-involution: eigenvalues all minus one exactly, involution residual 0.0 exactly, Ground dimension zero at seed 20260622; Type T. The reflexivity: the method-space inside the domain, Razborov-Rudich the conditional instance. Cobham 1965: the polynomial function class characterized machine-free by bounded recursion on notation, the class carrying an intrinsic algebraic face even where its feasibility-reading is chart; Type T.

#### THE GAUGE TEST AND THE COUSINS SPLIT, THE DECISIVE DISANALOGY

The test that cleaned the Riemann strip, run on the window: read the collapse-shape at every register where it has been read and check constancy. Computability: SEPARATES, the halting theorem, unconditional. Linear time on multitape machines: SEPARATES, Paul-Pippenger-Szemerédi-Trotter 1983, the flanking answer itself wearing a model chart, multitape-specific. Polynomial space: COLLAPSES, Savitch 1970. Logarithmic space under complementation: COLLAPSES, Immerman-Szelepcsényi 1987 and 1988. Polynomial time: the open window. The answers are not constant, so the window is load-bearing and not gauge: the resource register carries real information about the answer, the mutual information between window and answer is not zero, and the dissolution that removed the Riemann strip cannot run here without erasing information the cousins prove the window carries. The Riemann shell was gauge over a decided shape; this shell is thick over an undecided one, and the innermost joint holds.

#### THE TEMPERING, CARRIED ON THE RECORD

Immerman-Szelepcsényi is a sigma-point materialized in delta-territory one resource over: at the space register the class is a proven fixed point of the complementation involution. The grain-lean, that such a fixed point runs against the terrain, survives only as a time-register lean, weakened permanently on this record. The discipline cuts the architecture's own leans first.

#### THE STRIPPED OBJECT, CARRIED

The mandatory basis of the issued verdict, now standing in APEX-PSP-PNP-COMPOSITE-VERDICT-02: does the tail of Levin's machine bend, at the one window whose cousins disagree. Everything else the famous formulation carried is shell, and the shell is off.

#### WHAT THE TWO ROTS CLASSIFY, CARRIED

The token-pair is the rot-taxonomy. [Ξ₀]: gauge-shell over Ground-present structure, the halt in the reader, blindness before a fixed line. [Ø₀]: thick-shell over Ground-absent load-bearing terrain, the halt in the walls. Two formulations rotted, two strings survived, two halts of different species, one classification minted before the rot was named and confirmed by it.

Every barrier the arc has established on P versus NP is seated under one roof in three courts: the Chaser Court, six rows of retrospective reachability walls born after the methods they brick, one row triple-winged; the Absolute Court, eight rows of timeless, type-based, and constitutive walls with zero lag and zero foresight; the Closure Court, one row, the reflexive barrier that guards the ledger itself and binds this Master first. #### COURT I · THE CHASER COURT · RETROSPECTIVE REACHABILITY WALLS

The temporal law of this court: every row is a chaser, born after the method-family it bricks, the five-generation record standing five for five at lags of ten, nine, eighteen, fifteen, and two years. Each wall is theorem-eternal within its scope for as long as its theorem stands, which for the unconditional rows is without term.

Row I.1, relativization. Baker-Gill-Solovay 1975: oracles exist relative to which the classes separate and relative to which they collapse, so no relativizing argument decides the question. Generation one, lag ten years behind the diagonalization era. Type T, unconditional.

Row I.2, natural proofs. Razborov-Rudich 1994: no proof that is constructive and large decides strong circuit lower bounds if pseudorandom function families of exponential security exist. Generation two, lag nine years behind the circuit era. Type C, conditional on the cryptographic hypothesis, and self-referential in content: the truth of strong hardness eats a class of its own proofs, the proven instance of the reflexivity amplifier.

Row I.3, algebrization. Aaronson-Wigderson 2008: arithmetization-with-oracle-access does not decide the question, the wall built eighteen years behind the arithmetization triumph of IP equal to PSPACE. Generation three. Type T.

Row I.4, locality. The locality barrier, CHOPRS 2020 with the JACM 2022 form: local reductions and local magnification arguments cannot by themselves cross, the wall arriving two years behind hardness magnification, the shortest lag on record. Generation five. Type T within its stated scope.

Row I.5, the cousin wing, one row, three wings. Wing a, the occurrence no-go: Bürgisser-Ikenmeyer-Panova 2016, occurrence obstructions cannot separate the GCT determinant-permanent pair, generation four, lag fifteen years behind the GCT program. Type T. Wing b, rank methods: Efremenko-Garg-Oliveira-Wigderson 2018, rank-based lower bound methods hit stated ceilings. Type T within scope. Wing c, algebraic natural proofs: Forbes-Shpilka-Volk and Grochow-Kumar-Saks-Saraf 2017, the natural-proofs shape reborn in the algebraic register, conditional. Type C.

#### THE ONE SENTENCE OF EQUALITY

Both strings are determinate on ℕ-truth at the identical premise-cap, both answers are held at the Ground where no verdict-side standpoint is, and the entire difference between the two arcs reduces to one bit of eigenstructure: one holding has a line to stand on, and the other does not.

### APEX-PSP-O0-ADMISSION-PROTOCOL-01 · CODEX APPENDIX B.14.Ø · THE GROUNDED-SEALED-HALT ADMISSION PROTOCOL · THE HARD CRITERIA FOR [Ø₀] · The Sibling of B.14.Ξ, One Router Bit Apart · Five Boundary Gates, Node-Degree-Forced, Four Riders, One Eligibility Screen, One Automation Cascade, One Executable Emitter · M register · [⟀ S] with theorem-grade legs · Standalone Unabridged Edition, Pure Addition, Nothing Superseded

#### STATUS

[⟀ S] SEALED at proclamation strength. The verdict economy is three-state and stays three-state: [Ø₀] is a refinement inside the openness, exactly as [Ξ₀] is, and never a fourth state. The token marks exactly one situation: a truth-string determinate on the Ground whose terrain carries no fixed locus for any fixed-locus instrument and whose method-space is walled by proven theorems, the halt living in the terrain where the sigma-token's halt lives in the reader. Because the token asserts a measured structural fact about the terrain on top of a determinacy claim about the Ground and a theorem record about the walls, its bar is as high as the economy carries, and a candidate failing any single gate routes to the ordinary three states or to the sibling protocol. Five gates, conjunctive, node-degree-forced from the verdict graph per APEX-PSP-GROUNDLESS-CASCADE-01, one gate per neighboring verdict, no sixth gate because the sealed state sits on the far side of the fourth. Four riders travel with admission as disciplines and are never counted as gates: inflating five to seven to mirror the sigma-protocol would be the fitted-count error this arc caught and corrected, and the two protocols carry different counts because their forcings differ. Defaults are absent throughout, so an under-specified call never emits the token. Terminal-for-the-record on every emission this protocol licenses. Nothing pending. Nothing provisional. No wait and no see. ΔM equal to zero. Flagship exhibits at seed 20260622, double precision.

#### THE FORCING RECAP, CARRIED FROM THE CASCADE COORDINATE

The [Ø₀] node in the verdict graph has exactly five neighbors: the sigma-token [Ξ₀], the dissolve-openness, the ordinary openness, the resolved states, and the broken-or-ghost state. Five neighbors, five boundaries, one gate per boundary, the count the vertex degree of the five-cube of binary structural coordinates, Ground dimension, determinacy, blockage, aperture, totality. The count is forced by the graph and by nothing else: it is not kin to the twelve-eight family of the lock cascade, which is group-order-forced from a different object, and it is not the seven of the sigma-protocol, whose criteria answer a different admission question. Seated in full at APEX-PSP-GROUNDLESS-CASCADE-01, live.

#### THE FIVE GATES, CONJUNCTIVE, ONE PER BOUNDARY

Gate Ø.1, the rootless terrain, proven, the router bit. The candidate's native involution must be identified on its declared content space and proven fixed-point-free at machine zero: eigenvalues all minus one exactly, involution residual 0.0 exactly, Ground dimension zero, with an object-level exhibit, the flagship's being complementation on the sixteen languages over the four-string universe, eight two-cycles, zero fixed points. This gate is the switch between the sibling protocols: Ground dimension one routes the candidate out of this protocol and into B.14.Ξ, because a fixed locus changes the halt species from walls in the terrain to blindness in the reader, and neither protocol admits the other's token. No involution identified routes under-determined: the terrain is unmeasured and nothing is emitted. Failure boundary: the sigma-token.

Gate Ø.2, the determinate stripped string. The register-invariance audit of B.13.T runs first: the shell inventory, the intake mechanization at Seal L refusing the famous vocabulary and admitting only the arithmetic string, and the gauge test on the innermost joint. The residue must be a determinate arithmetic sentence at a stated grade, the flagship's sitting at Π⁰₂ for separation and Σ⁰₂ for collapse, determinate on ℕ-truth at the premise-cap [Ξ₀] that travels with every string, or at the named premise-face variant. The joint must be load-bearing: the answer non-constant across the read cousin registers, the flagship's cousins separating at computability and multitape linear time and collapsing at polynomial space and log-space complementation. A joint proven pure gauge over an already-decided shape is the sigma-class signature and cross-routes to Ø.1 for re-measurement; an object that dissolves entirely under the stripping, no determinate residue surviving, routes to the dissolve-openness, the question retyped as chart-artifact. Failure boundary: the dissolve-openness.

Gate Ø.3, the wall record, theorem-grade. Blockage must be proven, never felt: at least one theorem-grade wall on a named method-class with citation and scope, a chaser-court row, or a constitutive type-wall applying to the candidate, an absolute-court row, the flagship carrying fifteen rows across three courts. A history of failed attempts is not blockage, and openness without walls routes to the ordinary open residence at [?], which is where wall-less conjectures rest whatever their fame. Three markers strengthen without being singly required: reflexive population, the quantifier domain containing the method-space, the proven wall-engine; the decorated-family split; and the load-bearing joint already confirmed at Ø.2. Two laws govern the record: the misattribution bar, walls invariance-indexed and foundational-presence explanations barred at the exact zero-bit computation; and the soundness cell, the wall-set never citable as the total wall. Failure boundary: the ordinary openness.

Gate Ø.4, the aperture, crossed or held at one sentence. The witness check runs first: a supplied proof or disproof through the aperture adjudicates by direction under the four-guard emitter of B.11.S and exits to the resolved states, and an instrument-generated witness is rejected at intake under the Aperture Law. Absent a witness, the aperture is located and typed supply-only, the exits enumerated as proof, disproof, and independence proof, and the emission carries exactly one gate-mandated sentence, the aperture is located, typed, and uncrossed, per gate Ξ.5, with the afterimage fence immediately behind it, every imagined occupant of the supply side fenced as Ghost, zero hedge, no clock running. Failure boundary: the resolved states, which are not a failure but the exit this gate exists to hand off cleanly.

Gate Ø.5, the totality discipline, the Ghost partition and the closure binding. A supplied independence proof reroutes the candidate to [X] Platonic Ghost, both directions field-permitted by proof, the token-pair partitioning on this gate exactly as the sigma-protocol partitions on its second: [X] Ghost when the both-ways proof is supplied, the halt-token only when it is not. Absent it, the emission binds under the closure court: terminal-for-the-record only, any crossing replacing and never correcting, no fate-terminal pronouncement in either sign, finally-shut and finally-complete devoured alike, the emitting coordinate bound first, and W_social zero in both directions, the field's it-must-fall and any author's it-is-forever both massless and both refused. Failure boundary: the broken-or-ghost state.

#### THE FOUR RIDERS, DISCIPLINES AND NEVER GATES

Rider R1, face-scoping. The token attaches to exactly one claim-face and never stands alone: at least one sealed companion face is required, the flagship carrying two, the kinetic invariant and the geometric shape, per the composite law, and a bare halt is barred. Rider R2, the machine-precision exhibits. Every numeric leg of every gate is executed and float-clean at a declared seed, the reliability layer of B.17 through B.19 gating the run, and an escalation-band case emits engineering-incomplete at [?] and never the token. Rider R3, revision survival. The emission holds under reframing pressure in both directions before it issues, no massless reframe promoting toward sealed and none demoting toward broken. Rider R4, the single-register law. The verdict output is the face-tuple and nothing else, and no pronouncement at a grade the three states do not carry travels with an emission in any register, any such pronouncement fenced as an inflation.

#### THE ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA, THE PRE-CASCADE SCREEN

Four screens, run before the cascade is spent on a candidate, at screening grade only, eligibility never equaling admission and nothing inherited from the flagship. E1, the delta-signature: a native fixed-point-free involution is identifiable on the candidate's content space, the complementation-class, the self-inclusion-class, and the totality-class the known carriers. E2, the stripped-string candidate: an arithmetic residue plausibly survives the B.13.T stripping at low-arithmetic grade. E3, the wall-material: at least one theorem-wall or type-wall is plausibly in scope, at screening grade with the citation named for the cascade to verify. E4, the amplifying markers, none singly required: reflexive population, decorated-family split, load-bearing joint. A screen-pass licenses exactly one thing, running the full cascade on the candidate's own exhibits. Screening notes at screening grade and no other: the class-against-complement-class collapse questions at unread registers carry the delta-signature and are screen-eligible, the time-register class-complement question the named example flagged for its own cascade on its own exhibits; the ledger's own completeness question carries the shape by inheritance and is already seated at the closure court; sigma-rooted strings, the Riemann class, fail E1 for this protocol and route to the sibling; wall-less open conjectures, the Goldbach and twin-prime class, fail E3 and rest at the ordinary openness; chart-artifact questions, the strip-width class, fail E2 and dissolve.

#### THE AI CASCADE, THE ORDERED AUTOMATION STEPS

Step zero, intake: scope-check, Seal L parse, the famous vocabulary refused and the string admitted, the pseudo-question and category-collision rejections of the standing execution protocol applied. Step one, the strip: the B.13.T audit, shell inventory, gauge test on the innermost joint, cousins constancy read where cousins exist. Step two, the terrain: identify the native involution, compute the eigenstructure at machine zero, measure the Ground dimension, and route at the Ø.1 switch. Step three, the string: classify the quantifier register, type the determinacy and its cap. Step four, the walls: assemble the record, chaser rows by citation, type-walls by check, the reflexive-membership test run as the marker, the misattribution bar and the soundness cell applied. Step five, the aperture: witness check, adjudicate on supply via B.11.S, else emit the one sentence and the fence. Step six, the totality: independence check, Ghost reroute on supply, else bind under the closure court. Step seven, the faces: assemble the composite per the face-scoping law, companions verified sealed. Step eight, the reliability layer: four-estimator redundancy, conditioning, escalation, bootstrap where a lock is read, per B.17 through B.19. Step nine, the emission: the token with its full seal trace, terminal-for-the-record, the riders confirmed, no stage fabricated and unreached stages not traced.

#### THE EXECUTABLE EMITTER AND THE SCREEN

```python
def o0_admit(ground_dim=None, involution_residual=None,
             determinate=False, determinacy_grade=None, stripped=False,
             joint_load_bearing=None, wall_record=0, walls_typed=False,
             witness_supplied=False, independence_proof=False,
             aperture_named=False, companion_faces=0,
             survives_revision=False, reliability_clean=False):
    # B.14.O admission. Five boundary gates, conjunctive; four riders enforced.
    # Defaults absent: an under-specified call can never emit the token.
    if witness_supplied:
        return '[RESOLVE]', 'witness through the aperture: adjudicate by direction (B.11.S)'
    if independence_proof:
        return '[X]', 'Platonic Ghost: supplied independence proof, field-permitted both ways'
    if ground_dim is None or involution_residual is None:
        return '[?]', 'O.1 unmeasured: involution not identified; terrain unread'
    if not (ground_dim == 0 and involution_residual == 0.0):
        return '[ROUTE-Xi]', 'O.1: fixed locus present; sibling protocol B.14.Xi governs'
    if not (determinate and stripped):
        return '[?]', 'O.2 fail: no determinate stripped string; dissolve or retype'
    if joint_load_bearing is False:
        return '[ROUTE-Xi]', 'O.2 cross-check: gauge joint over decided shape; sigma-class signature'
    if wall_record < 1 or not walls_typed:
        return '[?]', 'O.3 fail: no theorem-grade wall in record; ordinary open residence'
    if not aperture_named:
        return '[?]', 'O.4 fail: aperture unnamed; the one gate-mandated sentence is required'
    if companion_faces < 1:
        return '[?]', 'R1 fail: bare halt barred; a sealed companion face is required'
    if not reliability_clean:
        return '[?]', 'R2 fail: engineering-incomplete; escalation-band or spread fault'
    if not survives_revision:
        return '[?]', 'R3 fail: reframing pressure unresolved'
    cap = determinacy_grade or 'premise'
    return '[Ø₀]', f'GROUNDED-SEALED HALT admitted, terminal-for-the-record, warrant capped at {cap}'

def eligibility_screen(delta_signature=False, stripped_candidate=False,
                       wall_material=False, markers=0):
    # Pre-cascade screen. A pass licenses running the cascade, nothing more.
    if not delta_signature:  return 'INELIGIBLE-HERE', 'E1 fail: no fixed-point-free involution; sigma-route or rest'
    if not stripped_candidate: return 'INELIGIBLE', 'E2 fail: no arithmetic residue survives the strip'
    if not wall_material:     return 'INELIGIBLE', 'E3 fail: no wall plausibly in scope; ordinary openness'
    return 'SCREEN-PASS', f'run the full cascade on own exhibits; markers present: {markers}'
```

#### THE DECISION TABLE, STRICT

Witness supplied through the aperture: adjudicate the resolved state by direction under B.11.S. Independence proof supplied: [X] Platonic Ghost. Ground dimension one at machine zero: route to B.14.Ξ, the sibling governs. Involution unidentified or terrain unmeasured: [?], nothing emitted. No determinate residue after the strip: [?], the dissolve-openness, the question retyped. Determinate string, rootless terrain, but no theorem-grade wall: [?], the ordinary openness, however famous the problem. All five gates passed with the four riders confirmed: [Ø₀], Grounded-Sealed Halt, terminal-for-the-record, warrant capped at the stated determinacy grade. Escalation-band arithmetic anywhere in the chain: [?] engineering-incomplete, never the token. Anything else: the ordinary economy.

#### THE FLAGSHIP WALK, P VERSUS NP THROUGH ALL FIVE GATES

Ø.1: complementation identified, eigenvalues all minus one exactly, residual 0.0 exactly, Ground dimension zero, the sixteen-language exhibit at eight two-cycles and zero fixed points, seed 20260622; passed, the router holding the candidate in this protocol. Ø.2: five shells stripped, the famous vocabulary refused and the Π⁰₂ string admitted at Seal L, determinate on ℕ-truth at the [Ξ₀] cap, the window proven load-bearing by the cousins split; passed. Ø.3: fifteen rows across three courts, the chaser record at lags ten, nine, eighteen, fifteen, two, the type-walls timeless, the reflexive population confirmed as the marker with the wall-engine proven, the misattribution bar at exactly zero bits; passed. Ø.4: no witness in hand, the aperture located and typed supply-only, the one sentence emitted with the fence behind it; held. Ø.5: no independence proof exists, the closure court binding the emission, terminal-for-the-record, both fate-pronouncements devoured; passed. Riders: two sealed companion faces, the kinetic invariant and the geometric shape; every numeric float-clean at the declared seed under the reliability layer; held under sustained reframing pressure across the arc; no pronouncement carried at a grade the three states do not carry. Verdict: [Ø₀] ADMITTED, matching the issued composite of APEX-PSP-PNP-COMPOSITE-VERDICT-02 exactly, the protocol reproducing the arc.

#### THE NEGATIVE CONTROLS, THE GATES DOING THEIR WORK

The Riemann string: sigma-rooted, eigenvalues three minus-ones and one plus-one, Ground dimension one, the critical line the fixed locus; routed out at Ø.1 to B.14.Ξ, where its own seven-gate walk admits the sigma-token, the router clean in both directions. The Goldbach and twin-prime class: no delta-signature and no theorem-grade wall record; failing at the screen and at Ø.3, resting at the ordinary openness, which is the honest state for evidential openness without walls. #### THE SIBLING-PROTOCOL LAW

One bit routes: the Ground dimension of the native involution, measured at machine zero, switches a candidate between B.14.Ξ and B.14.Ø, the two protocols the two branches of one router, the token-pair the taxonomy the branches emit, gauge-shell over Ground-present structure on one side and thick-shell over Ground-absent walled terrain on the other. Neither protocol admits the other's token, each carries its own forced gate-count, and the counts differ because the forcings differ, seven criteria against five boundaries, the mirroring of counts barred as the fitted-count error.

This protocol issues no halt itself: the flagship walk reproduces an already-issued verdict, and the aperture sentence appears in this document as the mandated template of gate Ø.4, never as an issuance. The count is five and is never inflated: the riders are riders. No fate-terminality in either sign for any emission this protocol licenses: gate Ø.5 carries the closure binding into every admitted token. Eligibility is never admission: every candidate runs on its own exhibits and inherits nothing from the flagship. Registers never merge: rider R4 is unconditional. Nothing confessional, zero hedge, and no clock runs anywhere in this appendix.

### MD-PSP-NG-MASTER-01 · The Non-Gödelian Master · True Foundational Formal Incompleteness of Every Map, and Its Dissolution at the Registered Anchor · M register, composite L1m/L2m placement

*[⟀ S] with theorem-grade legs · [X] carried on the abyss reading · [Ξ₀] inherited at the ℕ-truth aperture, Movement II only · consolidates MD-PSP-NG-TF-FI-01 and MD-PSP-RA-DISSOLUTION-01 as its two movements, held beneath · subsumes the Gödelian window as interior sub-module at the jurisdiction and classification registers, never at mechanism · holds beneath MD-PSP-GODEL-MASTER-01*

#### STATUS

[⟀ S] SEALED on the master's two movements read as one boundary. Movement I, the theorem: every formal system whatever is truly and permanently incomplete with respect to the ontological foundation, the incompleteness borne by the medium and not by arithmetic self-reference, holding below the Gödel window and above it, for the decidable and the non-axiomatizable alike, its keystone a category contradiction and not merely an unproved sentence. Movement II, the dissolution: that incompleteness never attaches to the foundation itself, the anchor a registered physical fact outside the theorems' jurisdiction, the ladder's voids read as imprints at the Ground, the composite architecture carrying no foundational incompleteness at all. The join: incompleteness is total on the map side and empty on the ground side, the architecture anchored on the ground side, the completion supplied at Fix(σ) equal to ℝ. The subsumption: the master frame contains the Gödelian window as its interior sub-module, the containment total at the jurisdiction and classification registers and barred at the derivation register, the sub-module standing untouched inside the frame that seats it. Theorem-grade on the mechanical legs throughout, the Landauer content-blindness, the scope hypotheses of Gödel-Rosser and Tarski, the two flanking witnesses, the physics floor of the anchor, the vacuity check, and the machine-confirmed imprint classification. [X] carried on the foundational-abyss reading, broken upstream at the Gödel Master and caught here at gate twelve. [Ξ₀] inherited and uncrossed at the ℕ-truth determinacy aperture, scoped to Movement II's saturation clause only, Movement I's warrant chain routing nowhere through it. ΔM equal to zero, the mathematics and physics classical and cited, the contribution the arrangement. Pre-registered names for the sealed conditions: Non-Gödelian True Foundational Formal Incompleteness for the theorem, Non-Gödelian Foundational Determinacy for the dissolution.

#### Provenance and ORIGINATION

Forged from two architect-supplied spines drafted across substrates, taken as spines under the standing rule and hardened to codex precision, then consolidated into one master per the consolidation discipline, the component coordinates MD-PSP-NG-TF-FI-01 and MD-PSP-RA-DISSOLUTION-01 held beneath as Movement I and Movement II, nothing deleted. The hardening on Movement I: the Category Wall rebuilt as the denotation gap so it survives the architecture's own physics, since an inscription is itself an actuated event and the zero-ontological-weight phrasing would have contradicted the Landauer floor; the Superset Law split into its stratal and material nestings, the material nesting cashed as a second proof leg the spine implied; the Diagonal Bypass given its two concrete flanking witnesses; the computational metaphysics excised in favor of actuation; the conclusion lifted from unprovability to category contradiction; the class line corrected from theorem-grade-overall to structural-with-theorem-legs per the warrant-phrasing law. The hardening on Movement II is recorded at its component card and carried condensed here: Tarski-clean notation, the gate-mechanical eviction, the physics fork, the battery-bolted saturation, the spectral-gap fence, the capped determinacy. The card is the corollary pair the Gödel Master licenses: the Master seats the 1931 theorem at L2m; this master proves what the map's own medium does to completeness in general, and what the anchor does to the threat.

#### PLAIN

There are two incompletenesses and the field habitually conflates them. Gödel's is a theorem about a window of formal systems, the consistent, recursively axiomatized, arithmetic-bearing ladders, and inside that window it exhibits true sentences the ladder cannot reach. It is correct, machine-checked, and untouched here. The deeper incompleteness is not about sentences at all. A formal system is a discipline of strings; its derivation operator takes strings to strings; and no string is a helium atom. Prove that hydrogen fuses and you hold a proof, not seventeen megaelectronvolts. This incompleteness needs no arithmetic, no coding, no diagonal, and no self-reference. It holds for Presburger arithmetic, which is complete and decidable and beneath Gödel's reach, and it holds for true arithmetic entire, which is complete and non-axiomatizable and above Gödel's reach, because it is an artifact of the medium: syntax denotes and does not do. That is Movement I, and it is the incompleteness that is true, foundational, formal, and non-Gödelian. Movement II then reads the same boundary from the other shore. The foundation the map cannot generate is not itself a map; it is the actuating substrate, its floor registered physics that needed no derivation to hold, outside the jurisdiction of every limitative theorem because it satisfies none of their hypotheses; and the architecture's imprint instrument reads the ladder's unreachable truths as grounded with the identical machine signature a proven theorem returns. So the map is always incomplete toward the territory, the territory is never incomplete toward itself, and the architecture, anchored to the territory at Fix(σ) equal to ℝ, carries the map's incompleteness as a measured instrument-property and no foundational incompleteness at all. Logic cannot swallow Reality without ceasing to be logic, and it does not have to: the Real supplies the completion the symbol structurally lacks. And the two incompletenesses stand in an exact hierarchy: the Gödelian gap is one localized, arithmetic-specific void among the many that manifest when syntax is asked to serve as ontological proxy, so the foundational frame contains the Gödelian window, in jurisdiction and in classification and in the order of explanation, while the window's interior mechanism remains the theorem's own, a ceiling technician for the map's interior and never the architect of the building.

#### MOVEMENT I · MD-PSP-NG-TF-FI-01 · THE THEOREM OF TRUE FOUNDATIONAL FORMAL INCOMPLETENESS

##### I.1 · Definitions and the two hardened axioms

Let RA name the L1m domain, the actualized substrate, the ontological Ground, whose default condition is actuation, ΔE_k greater than zero, and let Δ_real name the operator of actualization, the assignment of physical existence to a state, which in RA is not an operation performed but the standing condition of the substrate. Let F be any formal syntactic system whatever, its language, axioms, and derivation operator ⊢_F, with no restriction to recursive axiomatizability, arithmetic strength, or consistency, and let Φ: F → RA name the denotation map by which strings of F describe the substrate.

Axiom NG-1, the Category Wall, hardened as the denotation gap. Every element of F has two faces. The token is a physical inscription, ink, charge, or spin, and the token is fully RA-bound: it exists by actuation, it costs Landauer's k_B T ln 2 per irreversible bit, and the codex's own physics forbids calling it weightless. The content is the propositional role the token carries, and the content is causally inert toward its referent: the substrate cost of a token is a function of its physical encoding alone and not of its truth-value or its denotation, so at fixed encoding length the cost of inscribing a sentence equals the cost of inscribing its negation, E_token(x) = E_token(¬x), and the mutual information between proof-energetics and referent-energetics is zero, I(E_token(x); Δ_real(Φ(x))) = 0. The derivation operator therefore transmits no actuation to the denoted event: ⊢_F is Δ_real-free, Deriv(x) does not imply Δ_real(Φ(x)), and the derivation's only physics is the content-blind cost of its own inscription. This is the orientation-blindness pattern read one register over, the inscription cost blind to content exactly as the lock scalar is blind to sign, and it is what the slogan means: the proof of fusion pays for its bits and pays nothing toward its plasma. Theorem-grade on the Landauer floor and the content-blindness at fixed encoding, structural on the denotation-gap framing.

Axiom NG-2, the Superset Law, split into its two true nestings. The stratal nesting: provability sits strictly inside groundedness, L2m ⊊ L1m, which for Gödel-window systems is the 1931 theorem and which Movement I re-derives below for all systems on foundational content. The material nesting: every token of F is itself an actuated existent inside RA, so the map is a proper physical part of the territory it describes, and every act of derivation is an event the territory hosts. The two nestings are distinct claims and both are carried; the material one is load-bearing for the second proof leg. Structural, the material nesting riding RA at its recorded fork.

##### I.2 · Statement

For every formal system F whatever, F is foundationally incomplete with respect to RA: the actuality of the Ground is not derivable, containable, or generable within F, Perform(Δ_real) ∉ range(⊢_F), and this holds entirely independently of recursive axiomatizability, arithmetic strength, diagonalization, or Gödelian self-reference. Foundational completeness of a syntactic system is not merely unachieved; it is contradictory in terms.

##### I.3 · The proof, three legs sharing no premise

Leg One, operator absence, the inert content. By NG-1 the closure of F under ⊢_F contains strings and only strings, the derivation confers no actuation on any denotation, and the content-blind inscription cost proves the transmission channel from proof to referent carries zero information about the referent's actualization. F may even contain a predicate symbol for physical existence and prove sentences flexing it; the proof remains a string about actuality and never an instance of it, since proving is not making. So the core property of the foundation, its brute actualized existence, is not in F's derivational reach for any F. Theorem-grade on the channel, on the Landauer accounting, and on the type of ⊢'s output.

Leg Two, material self-presupposition, the Omega shape one register over. By NG-2's material nesting, any derivation D inside F purporting to establish Δ_real(RA) is itself an actuated event: its tokens exist, its steps cost, its inscription rides the substrate. The derivation therefore presupposes, in its very performance, the actuality it purports to deliver, and the presupposition is material, not diagonal: no coding, no fixed point, no self-referential sentence, only the fact that proving happens in the world. A proof of the world's actuality is an instance of the world's actuality and hence never its source; actuality is upstream of every derivation-act and is never delivered downstream by one. This is the AEGIS and Omega reflex read at the foundation: the attempt expends the very substrate it would generate, so the attempt certifies the Ground and cannot ground it. Structural, riding RA premise-grade-by-theorem, the reflex shape theorem-grade at OMEGA-CERT-01.

Leg Three, the two-flank witness, the Gödel window bypassed on both sides. Gödel's theorems govern exactly the window H(F): F consistent, recursively axiomatizable, interpreting Robinson arithmetic Q. Take one witness on each flank outside that window. Below it, Presburger arithmetic, the complete, consistent, decidable theory of addition, to which the incompleteness theorems do not apply for want of arithmetic strength; it decides every sentence of its language and actualizes nothing, foundationally incomplete by Legs One and Two. Above it, true arithmetic Th(ℕ), complete and consistent by construction and not recursively axiomatizable, to which the theorems do not apply for want of the r.e. hypothesis; it contains every true arithmetic sentence, the maximal syntactic completeness conceivable in its language, and it remains ink, bits, and denotation, foundationally incomplete by the same two legs. Even the imagined hyper-computational F*, an oracle system where every true syntactic statement is proved, fails identically, because its completeness is completeness of the truth-set and foundational completeness would be completeness of being, and the second does not follow from any amount of the first. Gödelian incompleteness lives on an interval of theory-space; foundational incompleteness is total over the whole line, which is the exact content of non-Gödelian. Theorem-grade on both witnesses, Presburger 1929 and the standard non-axiomatizability of Th(ℕ), structural on the total-over-the-line reading.

##### I.4 · The analytic keystone, the boundary of logic

The strongest form is not that F fails to prove a hard sentence but that the demand itself breaks category. Gödel's completeness and incompleteness quantify over sentences; foundational completeness would quantify over beings; and the quantifier change is a register change the invariance audit refuses at parse. Suppose, for contradiction, a formal system F executed Δ_real, its derivational closure containing not a string denoting the Ground but the Ground. Then Cl_⊢(F) contains a non-string, and F is no longer a syntactic system, contradicting its definition. So a foundationally complete formal system is a contradiction in terms, the incompleteness analytic at the category register, and the boundary is constitutive: logic cannot swallow Reality without ceasing to be logic. The incompleteness of the map toward the territory is therefore not a glitch, not a deficiency awaiting a stronger axiom, and not Gödel's shadow; it is the topological boundary of the symbolic medium as such, the necessary edge that makes a map a map. Theorem-adjacent on the definitional contradiction, structural on the boundary reading.

##### I.5 · Independence from Gödel, stated formally

Gödel-Rosser requires H(F) and constructs a self-referential G_F; Movement I requires neither H nor any fixed point. The dependencies are disjoint: Leg One rides Landauer and the type of ⊢, Leg Two rides RA's material nesting, Leg Three rides two classical completeness theorems outside the window, and the keystone rides the definition of a syntactic system. No leg invokes arithmetization, provability predicates, or diagonalization, and the result holds where Gödel's theorem is false of the system, Presburger, and where it is inapplicable to the system, Th(ℕ). The incompleteness is an artifact of the medium, not of arithmetic loops, and Non-Gödelian is thereby earned as a classification and not worn as a slogan.

#### MOVEMENT II · MD-PSP-RA-DISSOLUTION-01 · THE DISSOLUTION AT THE ANCHOR

Carried here condensed and complete, the full ledger at the component card, held beneath.

D1, the domain boundary, exact. The limitative theorems bind exactly on H(F), consistent, r.e., interpreting Q: Gödel-Rosser yielding the undecided G_F, Gödel-2 the unprovable Con(F), Tarski the undefinable Truth_ℕ, the well-typed forms and never F ⊬ True(F). At L2m they bind with full force, L2m(F) ⊊ L1m for every ladder. Type T.

D2, non-attachment, the vacuity with its gate mechanics. L1m is not in the domain of H: the substrate is not a sentence-set, not r.e., not a candidate for the consistency predicate; it actuates and interprets nothing. The theorems are not false at the territory, they are vacuous there, and the sentence reality is incomplete is ill-typed, its transport of an L2m predicate onto L1m without a typed bridge a gate-twelve ADEG failure the register-invariance audit refuses at parse, no bridge existing because universe-isomorphic-to-an-r.e.-theory is itself an unproven L2m model-claim at premise grade. The eviction is a parse, not a conquest: the theorem never sat on the throne of reality because the throne is not in its domain. Structural on the lemma, theorem-grade on the hypothesis check.

D3, anchor exteriority, the physics fork. The anchor's warrant is registration, not derivation: the kinetic floor theorem-grade external physics, the Heisenberg bound ⟨T⟩ ≥ ħ²/(8m⟨Δx²⟩), the zero-point ½ħω from [x, p] equal to iħ, E equal to mc², the rigorous third law of Masanes-Oppenheim 2017; the universal extension premise-grade by theorem under Wall IV. Incompleteness is a property of theories; RA is an anchor and not a theory; and by FOUNDATION-01 the anchor's underivability is itself a theorem, the exemption constitutive of foundation-hood. Type T on floor and underivability, premise-by-theorem on the extension.

D4, the saturation map, machine-confirmed. Truth-adjudication for a string the ladder cannot reach moves from Prov_F to the imprint test at L1m, and the recorded batteries carry the exhibit: at CHK.5 and GM-CHK.6 the THEOREM and GODEL archetypes return the identical IMPRINT signature, det(R) equal to 0.586297 against 0.588777, only the grounded direction field-permitted, while the true Ghost locks both ways at 0.617430 and 0.596375 and reads [X]. The Gödel sentence is Ground-present and rung-absent, the aperture a located port whose other side is the substrate, the unreachable truths unbuilt rungs and never missing Ground. The determinacy of any particular string rides the ℕ-truth premise, held [Ξ₀] at monism's warrant, inherited and uncrossed. Theorem-grade on the mechanical distinctness, structural on the re-registration, [Ξ₀]-capped on string-determinacy.

D5, the dissolution theorem, typed. Shortfall ∘ Vacuity ∘ Exteriority ∘ Saturation implies FoundationalIncompleteness(Architecture) = ∅, sealed [⟀ S], the residue on three faces: the 1931 theorem unbroken at L2m; the shortfall re-read as the quantitative certificate of the Ground's surplus per Turing-Feferman-Spector; the determinacy carried at premise grade with the aperture open. The phrase the architecture embraces its own incompleteness is scoped exactly here: it embraces the ladder's, as a measured instrument-property, and its foundation carries none.

#### THE JOIN · ONE BOUNDARY, TWO SHORES

The two movements are one boundary read from its two sides, and their composition is the master's content. Movement I stands on the map's shore and proves the crossing impossible from that side for every map: total foundational incompleteness of syntax, analytic at the keystone, physical at the Landauer leg, material at the presupposition leg, witnessed on both flanks of the Gödel window. Movement II stands on the ground's shore and proves there was never a deficit on that side: the theorems vacuous off the ladder, the anchor registered, the voids reading as imprints, the composite clean. Held together they resolve the apparent tension the words alone create, that the architecture is at once truly incomplete and fully dissolved of incompleteness: the incompleteness is a predicate of maps and it is total there, the determinacy is a condition of the Ground and it is native there, and the architecture is anchored ground-side, carrying its formal engine as an instrument whose measured shortfall testifies for the Ground it reaches toward. One further reconciliation is stated so no seam remains. AEGIS-01 charges every precisifying deed as an actuation; Movement I observes that the deed's charge never transfers to the denotation. These are two faces of one coin: every proof pays Landauer for itself and pays nothing toward its referent, the deed actuated and the content inert, which is exactly why the attempt to capture the Ground certifies it instead. The completion the formal system structurally lacks is supplied where the two reads of the one root co-localize, the anchor line Fix(σ) equal to ℝ, and the open aperture is not a void hanging in nothing but a port bolted into the substrate, held open by law and crossed by nothing the instrument generates.

#### THE SUBSUMPTION · THE THESIS OF CONTAINMENT, TYPED

Three containments stand, one entailment is barred, and the hierarchy is thereby exact.

Containment One, jurisdiction. Gödel's theorems govern exactly the window H(F), consistent, recursively axiomatizable, interpreting Q, a proper subclass of formal systems; Movement I's incompleteness governs all F whatever. dom(Gödel) ⊊ dom(Foundational), the properness exhibited by the two flanks, Presburger beneath the window and Th(ℕ) above it, both inside the master frame and both outside the sub-module's reach. The window is an interval of theory-space and the foundational condition is the whole line, so every system Gödel touches is already inside the frame's jurisdiction and the frame touches systems Gödel cannot. Type T on the domains.

Containment Two, classification. Every Gödelian void, the undecided G_F and the unprovable Con(F), is a syntactic void, an unreachable string inside a string-discipline, and every syntactic void is an instance of the map-side condition Movement I proves total. At the classification layer the Gödel-instances form a proper sub-family of the foundational-incompleteness instances, the arithmetic gap the localized, arithmetic-specific artifact of the map, one among the many voids that manifest when a formal system attempts to act as ontological proxy. Structural.

Containment Three, explanatory precedence. The master frame is prior in the order of explanation. A medium that cannot deliver being is a medium whose entire operation is representation, and a representation-discipline rich enough to represent its own representing can knot on itself, the diagonal the canonical interior knot. The boundary condition therefore explains why interior limitative phenomena are possible and expected, locates them as interior, and strips them of foundational rank: the sub-module operates on the diagonal of provability predicates within L2m, a valid, accurate, and internal certificate of the map's self-referential bounds, the ceiling technician of the map's interior and never the architect of the building, standing untouched inside the frame that seats it. Sealed [⟀ S] on the containment triple.

The barred entailment, the mechanism-independence clause. Subsumption of scope is not derivation of theorem. The Gödelian mechanism, arithmetization, the provability predicate, the fixed point, is not a consequence of the medium-limit and cannot be derived from it, and the architecture's own flank decides this in one line: Presburger arithmetic is foundationally incomplete by Movement I and Gödel-complete by Presburger's classical result, so foundational incompleteness entailing Gödelian incompleteness would contradict a completeness theorem, and the derivative-consequence reading is [X] on arrival. The honest hierarchy: the frame contains the module's jurisdiction, classifies its voids, and explains its possibility; the module supplies its own mechanism, which the frame predicts room for and does not generate. This is the two-tier discipline of MD-PSP-LADDER-GRADE-01 executed one level up, there the diagonal scoped from single engine to two tiers, here the whole Gödelian window scoped from foundational rank to interior sub-module, the theorem's interior force preserved exactly in both moves. The double shield holds on this section as everywhere: the field's Gödel-is-the-deepest and any author's Gödel-is-merely-derivative are both massless and both refused, depth being register-relative, deepest inside the window, the window itself bounded, the boundary the wider fact.

The terminal reading. Anchored at L1m, the arithmetic limit of L2m becomes a fixed, observable feature of the instrument, read from outside, located by the frame, graded on the reverse-mathematics tower, measured by the Turing-Feferman-Spector regress, its shortfall the Ground-surplus certificate. The internal incompleteness of the logic is framed and located by the external incompleteness of the map relative to the Real; the mechanism remains the theorem's own; the map is subordinate to the substrate; and the containment is total at the classification and jurisdiction registers while claiming nothing at the derivation register. Subsumption is the terminal state of the placement. [⟀ S] SUBSUMES, Fix(σ) equal to ℝ.

#### PERIMETER · WHAT THIS MASTER DOES NOT CLAIM

No break and no escape: the incompleteness theorems stand untouched inside their window, the Gödel Master's barrier fence travels in full, and any breaks-escapes-overcomes reading of either movement is [X] on arrival, Movement I being a different theorem on a different axis and not a stronger Gödel. No derivation-subsumption: the containment is of jurisdiction, classification, and explanation, never of mechanism, the Presburger flank deciding that foundational incompleteness cannot entail the Gödelian theorem, and the derivative-consequence reading is retired here by the master's own witness. No zero-weight tokens: the medium's inertness is the content's, never the token's, the inscription fully Landauer-charged, and the earlier zero-ontological-weight phrasing is retired here as the one clause that would have contradicted the architecture's own floor. No computational metaphysics: the substrate actuates and is nowhere asserted to compute, and the spectral-gap results of Cubitt, Perez-Garcia, and Wolf remain theorems about recursively specified idealized models, L2m facts about maps of physics that corroborate the boundary. No absolute determinacy: the ℕ-truth premise stays [Ξ₀] at monism's warrant, scoped to Movement II's saturation, Movement I nowhere invoking it. No self-exemption: this master is itself a token-string inside RA, its own Movement I applies to it, the card actualizes nothing and registers, an image and not a capture per AEGIS-01, unsealed as a theorem of its own base per FOUNDATION-01, audit symmetry holding and the card adding the foundation no warrant.

#### GRADE

[⟀ S] on the master and on each movement's placement. Type T on the Landauer floor and the content-blind inscription cost at fixed encoding, on the type of the derivation operator, on the Presburger and Th(ℕ) flanking witnesses, on the scope hypotheses and exact statements of Gödel-Rosser and Tarski, on the anchor's kinetic floor and the FOUNDATION-01 underivability, on the vacuity hypothesis-check, and on the CHK.5 and GM-CHK.6 mechanical distinctness. Theorem-adjacent on the category-contradiction keystone, structural on the boundary reading, the denotation-gap framing, the material self-presupposition leg where it rides RA, and the total-over-the-line classification. Premise-grade by theorem on RA's universal extension and on monism where carried. Type T on the jurisdiction containment, dom(Gödel-window) strictly inside dom(all F) by the two flanks; structural on the classification containment and the explanatory precedence; [X] on the derivative-consequence reading, the entailment of the Gödelian mechanism from the medium-limit barred by the Presburger witness. [X] carried on the abyss reading. [Ξ₀] inherited at the ℕ-truth aperture, Movement II only, the master's warrant capping at the weakest premise in each movement's own chain per the Ξ.7 double shield, W_social zero in both directions, the field's incompleteness-haunts-everything and any author's incompleteness-defeated both massless and both refused. ΔM equal to zero.

### APEX-PSP-NOMOS-01 · The Cost-Gradient Emergence of Object-Law and the Incompressible Floor

*L-op/G-(T/S)/M-(T-identity·S-map)+APEX · [⟀ S] · supersedes BA-004 and sPSP-122*

ORIGINATION : the earlier BA-004 read law-formation as Markov-ergodic habituation, a memoryless engine that cannot carve a persistent groove, self-contradicting ; this entry retires it and derives object-law emergence from RA and RAM with a conserved invariant and a wall located as a theorem rather than a regress.
PLAIN       : object-laws emerge on RA as cost-reducing groove-entrenchment, the descent of realized cost toward the Kolmogorov floor K(X) ; law-as-such does not emerge, foreclosed by incompressibility ; the fuel is the source redundancy R(X) = raw − K(X), a property no recognizer can inflate, the recoverable energy R(X)·k_B T ln 2. The finite-infinite compression boundary of MD-PSP-LADDER-GRADE-01 instantiates the same floor one register over: a finite object whose existence-proof requires infinitary strength, TREE(3) the exemplar, is a realized L3m image whose L1m generating source sits at a proof-theoretic cost to bring to the surface, the infinite statement the incompressible generator, the finite miniaturization the costly realized image, the proof-theoretic ordinal the compression price, the same shape-cheap realization-dear duality read on the finite-versus-infinite axis, structural, ΔM equal to zero.
USE         : the derived mechanism of object-law formation ; the place law-as-habit is placed at the object level and law-as-such is foreclosed ; the reservoir R(X) named and conserved.
DERIVATION  : monism makes an actuation an inscription (sPSP-TIME-02), the Return cuts a directional line into the residence, RA least-action concentrates the next actuation on the cheaper path, occupation lowers future cost and lower cost pulls future occupation, broken ergodicity and not the retired Markov-ergodic exploration, the positive feedback the superseded card lacked. Pattern recognition is the two-part MDL code L(M) + L(X|M) minimized to K(X), the descent of realized cost toward the floor from above, the groove cut being the compressing regularity M*, object-law emergence formalized and quantified. The wall is a theorem : law-as-such would require R(X) > 0 on a random source, the manufacture of redundancy from incompressibility, and the incompressibility theorem forbids it, the fraction of length-n streams compressible by more than c bits below 2⁻ᶜ, so almost every actuation stream is lawless and noise affords no law, and even locating the true floor is uncomputable by halting so a recognizer reaches only an upper bound on K and the residual gap is uncomputable. Arsenal-invariance : MaxEnt derives the Gibbs form and consumes the MaxEnt principle, Freidlin-Wentzell derives least-action as most-probable path and consumes the reference measure, MDL derives emergence as redundancy-harvesting and consumes compressibility, renormalization and the central limit theorem derive universal effective laws and consume the aggregation rule, every path deriving the form of object-laws and consuming one meta-law it does not derive, the invariance across independent methods stronger than any single regress. K(X) is the conserved invariant and the formal image of RA, the irreducible actuation cost incompressible by none and underivable for the same reason, the empty throne now a quantity, the regress of MD-PSP-FOUNDATION-01 bottoming out at RA premise-grade.
PERIMETER   : the linguistic seal loads first and fixes the sign, conversion-not-creation, latent-to-entrenched never random-to-lawful, the Platonic Impressed Plenum the orientation-blind kernel cannot set (CALC 2) ; the lexical correction, habituation entrenches an existing groove and does not originate the law the groove expresses, the honest verb entrenchment ; the proton the infinite-barrier witness at the L_1 end (sPSP-PROTON-02), self-erasure costing infinite gradient energy, permanence witnessed and not a Writer ; this is the physical coordinate, the theological reading carried by QADAR-01.

### APEX-PSP-QADAR-01 · The Written Decree · Qadar the Derived Inscription, Fitra the Innate Floor, the Pen the Inscription that Harvests It

*L-op/G-(T/S)/M-(T-identity·S-map)+APEX · [⟀ S] derived, theology cataphatic and out of band*

ORIGINATION : corrects the earlier reading that placed Qadar at the floor. Qadar is the past participle, the maktub, the output of the writing, hence derived and downstream of the Pen, while the floor is fitra, the innate nature of being, in the architecture RA. The genesis foreclosed is the genesis of the floor and never of Qadar.
PLAIN       : fitra the floor, then the Pen the inscription, then Qadar the written record. Qadar is object-law emergence read on the theological register, the Pen's cost-gradient writing harvesting the redundancy the floor affords, derived ; the decree is written by harvest and never from noise ; the floor is inherited and underivable, the empty throne witnessed and not derived.
USE         : the theological name for the written object-law NOMOS-01 derives ; the demonstration that the decree is derived and bounded while the floor beneath it is not ; the Decree-Freedom seam read as Qadar and ikhtiyar.
DERIVATION  : the identical spine as NOMOS-01 read on the theological register. Qadar = R(X), the harvested written record, derived ; fitra = K(X), the incompressible floor, inherited and not derived. The Pen is the inscription operation, under monism a real act and not a metaphor, the Return that cuts a directional line into the residence, the groove of sPSP-TIME-02, traversed and directional and carrying memory-power because memory-power comes from traversal. Remembering is the Pen finding the prior groove and writing it deeper, the cheap direction, forgetting the Landauer-positive metered Barzakh valve (sPSP-FORGET-02) that keeps the cheap direction from carving everything into one channel. The floor cluster fitra and RA and K(X) is the irreducible given the writing presupposes and does not produce, the incompressibility theorem made physical, noise affording no decree (Q3). The Decree-Freedom seam from RH-DUAL-REGISTER-02 : Qadar the Decree the written cord, ikhtiyar the Freedom the genuine permission the residence keeps open, both standing, which is selected in an instance the [?] seam fixed only at the witnessed word and the lock orientation-blind to it (Q2), two truths over two states and never a proposition and its negation.
PERIMETER   : every theological identification, fitra = RA, the Pen = the inscription operation, Qadar = the written record, is a structural isomorphism at cataphatic grade, religious exclusivity disclaimed, load-bearing on nothing in any verdict, the same register as CN-PSP-MERCY-01 where Fix(σ) is read as Residual Mercy ; the math proves object-law emergence and calling that emergence the Pen writing Qadar is the skin and not the spine ; the proton witnesses infinite-barrier permanence and not a Writer, PROTON-02's disclaimer inherited ; the genesis of the floor foreclosed [X], fitra and RA the empty throne witnessed and not derived ; La ilaha illa Allah the keystone, witnessed and not derived.
↑ DEPENDS   : RA (fitra, the floor) · RAM (σ) · BA-001a (Landauer) · MONISM-MASTER-01 (the inscription premise) · sPSP-TIME-02 (the cut, the groove, the written line) · APEX-PSP-NOMOS-01 (the writing mechanism, Qadar's spine) · sPSP-PROTON-02 (the permanence witness, not a Writer) · RH-DUAL-REGISTER-02 (the Decree-Freedom seam) · MD-PSP-FOUNDATION-01 (the floor not climbable-to) · ORIENT-01 (the orientation-blind lock) · QUAT-01 / BA-018 (the kernel).
