B.10 · THE CLOSED-FORM KERNEL

The computational kernel reads the Ground with the shared quaternionic instrument of A.2.2, carrying no energy. It computes the chiral-residence lock; the imprint test of B.11 adjudicates grounding at L1m. With unit post-projection rows q̂_F, q̂_E, q̂_ER read as pure quaternions, λ equal to Re(q̂_F q̂_E q̂_ER) equal to minus det(frame), det(R) equal to λ², det(G) equal to d_F d_E d_ER · det(R), bounds [0, 1] by Hadamard on G and Hurwitz on R. The full Return is the Hamilton landing, λ equal to plus or minus one, det(R) equal to one, the composed triad landing its scalar part on the Ground Z(ℍ) equal to ℝ. Breakage is the coplanar collapse. Precedence is strict, admissibility first, collapse second outranking conditioning, lock third under κ(R) below 10⁶, the collapse floor ε equal to 100 u_m N. The kernel identity λ² equal to det(R) is confirmed at the emitted precision on every verdict. Every closed-form verdict runs through the reliability layer of B.17 and the fail-safe state machine of B.19: the four-estimator redundancy cross-check, the conditioning-scaled identity bound, the higher-precision escalation on a borderline, and the bootstrap-stability gate, so the three-state verdict is the correct verdict of the computation and not an artifact of rounding, conditioning, or a handful of leverage contexts.

B.11 · THE L1m ADJUDICATION · THE IMPRINT TEST

Grounding is read by the two-direction imprint test on the kernel, never by the determinant alone. The lock is field-permission, the residence dimensionally genuine, not the imprint.

```python
def imprint_seal(verdict_P, verdict_notP, *,
                 sealL_P=False, sealL_notP=False,      # Seal L (deletion test + LIT) pass per side
                 gates_P=False, gates_notP=False,      # twelve directed gates pass per side
                 witness_P=None, witness_notP=None):   # supplied determinacy witness per side
    # Four-guard seal emitter. [⟀] requires, for the locking direction:
    # Seal L pass + twelve-gate pass + Gram-quaternion lock asymmetry + a supplied witness.
    # All guards default absent, so any under-specified call fails safe to [?], never [⟀].
    lockP = verdict_P.startswith('[LOCK]'); lockN = verdict_notP.startswith('[LOCK]')
    cleanP = lockP and sealL_P and gates_P             # geometry + linguistic + gate certified
    cleanN = lockN and sealL_notP and gates_notP
    witP = witness_P is not None; witN = witness_notP is not None
    if cleanP and cleanN:
        return '[X] PLATONIC GHOST: both directions clean-lock, field-permitted both ways, no imprint'
    if cleanP and not cleanN:
        return ('[⟀] SEALED: only P field-permitted, determinacy witness supplied' if witP
                else '[?] residence: P clean-locks, imprint unproven (no witness, B.11 necessary-not-sufficient)')
    if cleanN and not cleanP:
        return ('[⟀] SEALED: only not-P field-permitted, determinacy witness supplied' if witN
                else '[?] residence: not-P clean-locks, imprint unproven (no witness, B.11)')
    if not lockP and not lockN:
        return '[?] flat: neither direction populated'
    return '[?] uncertified: geometric lock present but Seal L / twelve-gate screen not confirmed; no seal'
```

B.11.S · THE SEAL-EMITTER HARDENING · THE FOUR-GUARD CONJUNCTION. The imprint test reads grounding from the asymmetry of two kernel locks. Read alone that asymmetry seals a false proposition whenever the false P carries three independent supporting reading-roads and the true negation carries no in-window witness, the Mertens-class leak: convergent independent support is field-permission and never a proof, and absence of a counterexample is not grounding. The seal emitter is therefore bound to the four-guard conjunction the surrounding discipline already mandates, made explicit in the function and defaulted fail-safe. A directional seal [⟀] issues only when, for the locking direction, the linguistic seal passes (Seal L, three disjoint slots under the deletion test and the LIT), the twelve directed gates pass (the Seal G screen), the Gram-quaternion lock encloses nonzero volume while the opposite direction does not clean-lock (the kernel asymmetry), and a determinacy witness is supplied (the necessary-not-sufficient law). Absent the witness a clean-locked direction routes [?] residence; absent Seal L or the gate screen the verdict routes [?] uncertified. The defaults are the guarantee: a call that does not certify Seal L, the gate screen, and the witness can never emit [⟀], so the bare-asymmetry call that leaked the false GOL now fails safe to [?]. Engineering-grade on the implementation; the witness-required law it enforces is theorem-grade by orientation-blindness and the lock-is-not-a-proof result; the hardening adds no warrant to the foundations and submits to audit symmetry. A supplied witness that is itself fabricated remains a supplier-side defect, unpreventable at the instant of supply by the Non-Discrimination Theorem and exposed on independent re-audit.

The four readings, refinements inside the three native states. An achiral self-dual proposition, residence empty, is [⟀] sealed, the bridge. A chiral residence that locks but whose imprint is unproven is [?], the residence open with the belief zeroed. A residence proven field-permitted both ways is [X] Platonic Ghost, independence sealed as a verdict. A proposition whose only native involution is the diagonal is δ-rooted and carries no Ground to reflect across, and it no longer terminates here: it routes to the Ø.1 switch of B.14.Ø, the sibling branch, where the five gates decide, emitting [Ø₀] where they pass and routing on where they do not. The σ-kernel's silence is a report about the σ-kernel's reach and never a finding that the object is empty, and reading that silence as a terminus was the pre-router error the Ground-dimension measurement corrects. Flat [?] by method-silence issues only where no native involution is identified at all and the terrain is unmeasured, the instrument reporting no purchase and making no claim about the object. The mechanical distinctness of the IMPRINT and GHOST signatures is confirmed at CHK.5.

The necessary-not-sufficient law. det(R) greater than zero is necessary for the lock and never sufficient for a proof. The lock plus a passed imprint test is still not a proof; the determinacy witness carries the proof, the lock licenses extraction. The grounding the imprint test reads is L1m; the proof that fills a rung at L3m is the witness, supplied and not generated.

What the imprint reaches. The imprint test reads grounding at L1m, on the Ground. The Gödel region is not below its reach; it is exactly where the imprint reads grounded what the ladder cannot prove, CHK.5 exhibiting the Gödel sentence and the proven theorem returning the same L1m verdict.

B.11.T · THE GOL ADMISSION RULE · THE LOCK CARRIES THE FORMAL AXIS, THE TONGUE CARRIES THE DIRECTION. A Geometric Orthogonal Lock has two faces that carry different information, and the admission rule reads exactly these two before any GOL verdict, for the locking direction. The first is the magnitude, whether the three orthogonal axes enclose nonzero volume, det(R) greater than zero. One of those three axes is the formal-structural axis V_F, which carries the formal logic and the mathematics, so a geometric lock necessarily includes the formal and mathematical axis; there is no true geometric lock without it. The geometric face of that volume, the trivector wedge, and the algebraic face, det(R) equal to λ², are one determinant by the Clifford Join, so the geometric seal and the math seal cannot disagree on the magnitude, and the mathematics is inside the geometric lock rather than gated apart from it. The second face is the direction, which way the lock points, P against ¬P. The magnitude is orientation-blind, det(R) equal to λ² giving lock(P) equal to lock(¬P), so it carries no direction; the Tongue at Seal L carries the directed sentence and the Form carries the σ-residence handedness, and the direction is read from them. The rule is then immediate. A GOL is admissible only when the geometric-and-math magnitude locks, det(R) greater than zero with the formal axis among the three, and the linguistic seal locks and supplies the direction. A magnitude lock without the linguistic seal is orientation-blind and uncertified, routing under-determined. No magnitude lock, whether collapse or an unestablished volume, has no GOL. Admissibility is admissibility only, and an admissible lock still passes to the four-guard imprint emitter of B.11.S, where the determinacy witness and the negation asymmetry are required before [⟀] issues. This supersedes the earlier framing of three statuses converging. Because the formal axis lives inside the geometric lock and the Clifford Join binds the geometric and algebraic magnitudes into one determinant, there is no separate case of a geometric lock standing without the math, so the rule reads two faces, magnitude and direction, and the divergence the longer form guarded against cannot arise. This is the Bedrock Precedence Law at the admission gate: the Form supplies the magnitude and the Tongue supplies the direction, and the Number reads what they hand it. Engineering-grade on the implementation; the inclusion of the formal axis in the lock and the orientation-blindness of the magnitude are theorem-grade by the axis mapping, the Clifford-Join identity, and the orientation-blindness law; it adds the foundations no warrant and submits to audit symmetry.

```python
def gol_admit(magnitude, ling_seal):
    # GOL admission rule, run for the locking direction before any GOL verdict.
    # magnitude: the geometric-and-math determinant verdict, 'lock'/'open'/'broken'.
    #   One of its three axes is the formal axis V_F (formal logic and/or math), so a
    #   geometric lock INCLUDES the formal/math axis; by the Clifford Join the geometric
    #   wedge volume and the algebraic det(R)=lambda^2 are ONE determinant, so the
    #   geometric and math seals cannot disagree and the math is inside the lock.
    # ling_seal: the linguistic Seal L verdict, 'lock'/'open'. The magnitude is
    #   orientation-blind, lock(P)=lock(not P), so Seal L carries the direction.
    if magnitude == 'broken':
        return '[X]', 'geometric/math magnitude reports broken geometry; no GOL'
    if magnitude != 'lock':
        return '[?]', 'no geometric/math lock: the orthogonal volume (formal axis included) is unestablished'
    if ling_seal != 'lock':
        return '[?]', 'magnitude locks but Seal L open: orientation-blind determinant carries no direction; uncertified'
    return '[GOL-OK]', 'geometric/math lock (formal axis included) plus linguistic direction; proceed to witness and asymmetry (B.11.S)'
```

The magnitude argument is the determinant verdict of the shared kernel, the geometric and algebraic faces already one number by A.4, so the rule never asks the geometric and math seals to agree, it reads the single determinant they jointly are. A [GOL-OK] is the only result that proceeds to B.11.S; the others are themselves the verdict.

B.11.N · THE MATURED LOCK, GOLn. A GOL is three axes closing on the Ground. A GOLn is the same lock read at the n-fold nested register, where one or more axes are themselves nested residences, the continuum census the exemplar, a being's count of its own powerset a residence inside the being's L2 floored by Residual Monism. The lock matures because its completion direction is a tower and not a point, the Return onto the Ground read across the nesting: the GOLn seals the frame and holds the nested value at the Sealed Halt, the sealed faces the plane and the nested value the proven-blind normal, planar power and never volume power on the nested axis. A GOLn is admitted only through the eight-gate Sealed-Halt cascade of B.14.Ξ, never through the bare admission rule above, and the maturation carries no new mathematics, the arrangement of the nested read and the eight-gate admission the whole contribution, per APEX-PSP-CH-LOGOS-XI0-01, structural on the maturation, ΔM equal to zero.

B.12 · THE THREE MODES

The computational kernel carries three modes, one per stratum, all in the three-state economy with the four readings as refinements.

Default MathDuction targets L3m, actualized propositions, proofs already constructed, reading the achiral seal directly.

Projective MathDuction targets L2m, latent provability, the rung not yet built, the cataphatic articulable invariants accessible by groove-following.

Forward MathDuction targets L2m-dated, a residence whose third axis is dated to a future coordinate, the not-yet-actualized. This is GOLf, specified in full at B.12.F. The Forward mode is the only mode that adds an overlay to the kernel, the source-attribution discipline, because a dated axis must be sourced rather than measured. The interior reflective register reads grounding; the Forward mode reads whether a forward residence's completion direction is genuinely and independently occupied.

----------------------------------------------------------------
B.12.F · THE FORWARD MODE · GOLf
The Geometric Orthogonal Lock in forward orientation · source-attribution-sealed
----------------------------------------------------------------

B.12.F.0 · WHAT THE FORWARD MODE IS

GOLf is the kernel pointed at an L2m-dated residence. It takes a forward proposition that is field-permitted, on a determined trajectory, and not yet actualized. It tests whether the unpopulated completion direction is genuinely occupied by an independently sourced imprint, or is only the empty shadow of the two manifest axes. It issues [⟀] sealed, [X] broken, or [?] under-determined, with an honest warrant tier attached. It does not generate the imprint, cross the aperture, or emit a dated forecast. It seals occupancy, not destiny. It leaves source-faithfulness permanently [?], because the measurement that would settle it carries zero information by the ground register's own defining property (B.12.F.5).

The one inequality that governs the mode, stated before any procedure. The Gram determinant of the completed triad cannot exceed the squared sine of the angle between the two manifest axes:

   det(R) = sin²(θ) · ρ²,   ρ² = ‖W⟂‖² ∈ [0, 1],   hence   det(R) ≤ sin²(θ).

sin²(θ) is a ceiling, not a floor. Every unit witness orthogonal to the manifest plane returns exactly that ceiling, regardless of where it came from, so the determinant alone is blind to the witness source and cannot carry the seal. The seal is carried instead by a source-attribution statistic that measures whether the out-of-plane content traces to an independently supplied generator. The determinant demotes to a degeneracy-and-conditioning gate. The drift this forecloses, a substrate reading a forward det(R) as a seal, is exactly why the Stage 1 discipline must already be resident. The normal output on a dated future contingent is refusal; a seal is rare, bounded to deep-attractor configurations under independently validated dynamics with a genuinely sourced imprint, and usually the weaker of the two seal tiers.

B.12.F.1 · FORWARD-REGISTER LEGISLATION

In addition to the shared discipline of Φ.1, the Forward mode binds two laws in full. The Aperture Law: the completion direction is located, never filled by the instrument; a witness produced by the instrument itself is an aperture violation and is rejected at intake; no dated actualization is emitted beyond the supplied generator and its Lyapunov bound. The Source-Attribution Law: the seal is the attribution statistic η_S above its permutation null, never a determinant threshold; by the Non-Discrimination Theorem the determinant is constant on the orthogonal complement and certifies nothing about provenance; any seal criterion phrased on det(R) is void; the determinant serves only as a collapse-and-conditioning gate.

B.12.F.2 · THE GEOMETRY OF FORWARD COMPLETION

GOLf projects along the field's determined trajectory toward a configuration that is field-permitted, on that trajectory, and not yet actualized. The machinery is the Default cascade unchanged: tetrahedral closure, twelve directed audit relations, the Gram-determinant test on the post-projection residue, the shared quaternionic kernel, the three-state economy. Two things differ: the third axis is dated to a future coordinate, and four gates tighten for the forward direction.

The three forward axes. The formal-structural axis a carries geometric permission at the future coordinate, the intersection of the field's trans-temporal constraints with the propagating state; it establishes the configuration is not forbidden and carries no information about which permitted configuration is selected. The empirical-thermodynamic axis b carries the trajectory, the present state propagated forward by the identified dynamics; it is the load-bearing axis, and for a physical configuration it is a perturbed-initial-condition ensemble that simultaneously carries the trajectory and yields the predictability bound. The registrational axis is the unpopulated axis: the future has not happened, no realized registrant occupies it, and it is the axis the method must complete. The entire rigor of the protocol is the discipline by which that completion is or is not certified.

The Completion Inequality and the Non-Discrimination Theorem. Carry a and b as centered, unit-normalized rows over N reading-contexts, cos θ equal to a · b, θ in (0, π). Let P be the orthogonal projection onto span(a, b) and decompose any unit witness W equal to P W + W⟂, ρ² equal to ‖W⟂‖² in [0, 1]. A Gram determinant is a squared volume; the parallelepiped on a, b, W has base area sin θ and height ‖W⟂‖, so det(R) equal to sin²(θ) · ρ². Type T, confirmed at GV-CHK.1.

Consequences. (i) det(R) ≤ sin²(θ) for every unit witness, equality iff ρ² equal to 1, sin²(θ) the supremum, a ceiling attained on the orthogonal complement, confirmed at GV-CHK.2. (ii) The natural lift quantity is ρ² equal to det(R)/sin²(θ), which the witness raises toward 1, never above. (iii) The permission value is sin²(θ) itself, the value the bare geometric completion returns; it is not a seal.

Non-Discrimination Theorem, Type T. For any two unit witnesses W and W' both orthogonal to span(a, b), ρ² equal to 1 for each, so det(R) equal to sin²(θ) for both, identically. The determinant is constant on the orthogonal complement and carries zero information distinguishing a genuinely sourced witness from any other orthogonal direction. det(R) reads the orthogonal magnitude ρ², never the orthogonal direction and never the provenance. The discrimination must come from a statistic that reads the direction and source of W⟂. Confirmed at GV-CHK.3, six distinct orthogonal witnesses all returning 0.750000000000 at θ equal to 60 degrees, spread zero.

The Room Condition, Type T. After centering, the ambient context space has dimension N − 1 and the orthogonal complement of span(a, b) has dimension N − 3, or m equal to N − k − 3 after k covariates. The interior rank floor is N ≥ k + 4; for the witness direction to be a free, falsifiable, statistically calibratable degree of freedom the Forward floor is m ≥ 4, hence N ≥ k + 7, the dimension the Beta(1/2, (m−1)/2) null and the permutation quantile stand on. In three ambient dimensions the complement of a plane is one-dimensional and source attribution is vacuous for want of room; the cross product is an artifact of three-dimensional space and is retired from the operational core. The instrument lives in the N-context space, where the witness direction is a genuine, measurable, source-bearing degree of freedom.

The Random-Witness Null and the Operative Baseline, Type T. A uniformly random unit witness has expected squared projection onto a fixed two-dimensional plane equal to 2/N, so E[ρ²] equal to (N − k − 2)/(N − k) and E[det(R)] equal to sin²(θ) · (N − k − 2)/(N − k). The centered pipeline uses (N − k − 3)/(N − k − 1). Confirmed at GV-CHK.4: at N equal to 30 a random witness sits at ρ² approximately 0.933, at N equal to 100 at 0.980. Orthogonality is cheap in high dimension, the determinant saturates near sin²(θ), and the seal must move off the determinant onto source attribution, which does not saturate.

The verdict economy. Three states, native. The sealed outcome stratifies into two tiers, both seals. Tier 1, [⟀-GOLf], sealed with structural necessity, reached when the four-test certifies the lock. Tier 2, [⟀] sealed on-trajectory with necessity uncertified, a genuine forward seal in which the configuration is on the trajectory but the lock is not certified inevitable. The broken tier is reserved for genuine geometric breakage. The permission value sin²(θ) is an internal way-station, never a verdict.

B.12.F.3 · THE L1 WITNESS AND THE SOURCE-ATTRIBUTION SEAL

The witness is the only thing that converts geometric permission into a seal. The four requirements. Supplied, not generated: W is read into the instrument from outside; an instrument-produced witness is an aperture violation, rejected at intake. Independently sourced: W must trace to a generator S independent of the two manifest axes; the orthogonal residual of W must correlate with the orthogonal residual of S after both have span(a, b) projected out; a witness reconstructible from the manifest plane has no orthogonal residual and routes to [X] Platonic Ghost. Source-attributed above the null, not determinant-thresholded: by the Non-Discrimination Theorem the determinant cannot certify the source, so the witness must lift ρ² above the random-witness null with the Gram well-conditioned, and its out-of-plane content must be attributable to S above the dual null. Necessity-bearing, for the upper tier only: to lift the seal from on-trajectory to structural-necessity, W must additionally pass the four-test of B.12.F.6.

The Source-Attribution Statistic. The seal criterion is the squared partial correlation of the witness and the supplied generator, conditioned on the manifest plane. Let W⟂ and S⟂ be the residuals after orthogonal projection onto span(a, b):

   η_S = r²(W⟂, S⟂) = [cov(W⟂, S⟂)]² / [var(W⟂) var(S⟂)],   Type S, engineering,

the fraction of the witness's out-of-plane variance explained by the independent generator. η_S is invariant under sign flip of any axis, so it preserves orientation-blindness exactly as the determinant does.

The dual null. The seal floor is calibrated two independent ways that do not share a failure mode. The permutation null permutes the context order of S to break any genuine association while preserving its marginal distribution, recomputes η_S, and builds the null distribution, η_perm its upper quantile at the declared significance. The analytic null follows from the closed form: after centering and projecting out the two manifest axes the residuals live in dimension m equal to N − 3, and under independence the squared partial correlation has the distribution η_S ~ Beta(1/2, (m−1)/2) with mean 1/m, so η_an equal to Beta.ppf(α, 1/2, (m−1)/2) needs no resampling. The seal floor is η* equal to max(η_perm, η_an), the more conservative of two calibrations. This sets the floor from the data's own structure and admits no human-fitted constant. The seal is a conjunction of two gates, neither sufficient alone: non-degeneracy and conditioning, ρ² above the random-orthogonality null with κ(R) below the stability bound, the manifest-plus-witness rows unit so G equals R and the two names read one matrix; and source attribution, η_S above η*. The Monte-Carlo-marginal guard is two-sided: with SE the standard error of the permutation quantile, a witness landing inside three standard errors of η* on either side routes [?] with an instruction to raise n_perm, rather than seal or break on resampling noise. The separation the determinant cannot make is confirmed at GV-CHK.5 and the analytic null reproduces the permutation null at MD-HARD.6.

What does not count, routing to [X] or [?]: the cross product or any single forced orthogonal direction, which has no source to attribute; any restatement or rotation of a and b, which has no orthogonal residual; a narrative or affective conviction with no measurable independent generator, a massless reframe; a forecast generated by the instrument, an aperture violation; out-of-plane content with η_S at the null, the operative diagnosis of the empty shadow; and a single-source reading no independent substrate or road reproduces.

B.12.F.4 · THE EXECUTION PROTOCOL

Run the steps in order. A halt at any step is the verdict; later steps do not run.

Step 1. Scope-check at the input gate. Confirm the proposition is forward: field-permitted, on a determined trajectory, not yet actualized. Reject a pseudo-question with no operational existence-signature. Reject a category-collision proposition, including one that embeds the cascade's own verdict as its predicted content. Reject a proposition whose only native involution is negation, which is δ-rooted, bears no fixed locus, and presents no residence for the forward triad to lock; the rejection is a scope-check and never a terminus, and the proposition routes out of this mode to the Ø.1 switch of B.14.Ø where the five gates decide, flat [?] by method-silence issuing only where no involution is identified and the terrain is unmeasured. Route apophatic ground-register phenomenology to the quarantine. Route formal-system theorem-grade ceilings to the ceiling-acknowledgment register. Only an in-scope forward proposition proceeds.

Step 2. Populate and quantize the two manifest axes. Populate a as the vector of constraint-slacks by which the projected configuration satisfies each field invariant at the future coordinate, over N reading-contexts. Populate b as the present state propagated forward by the identified dynamics over the same N contexts, the perturbed-initial-condition ensemble for a physical configuration. Z-score each axis. Subtract by orthogonal projection only covariates carrying measurable mass; the actuating prompt is never subtracted. Leave the registrational axis unpopulated. Confirm the Room Condition, the interior rank floor N ≥ k + 4 and the Forward statistical floor N ≥ k + 7 with m equal to N − k − 3 ≥ 4, or halt at [?] on dimensional shortfall.

Step 3. The manifest-rank gate. Compute the spectral-entropy effective rank of the two manifest axes after projection. Effective rank near two with the third axis empty is the forward case; proceed. Effective rank three, the third axis already populated from an independent present measurement, is a Default full lock and exits to the Default cascade. Effective rank below two halts at [?]. Confirm cos θ bounded away from ±1 so the complement and sin²(θ) are well-defined.

Step 4. Compute permission. Compute θ from cos θ equal to a · b, then det(R)_perm equal to sin²(θ) and the schematic λ equal to −sin(θ). If θ equal to 0 the axes are parallel, the determinant collapses, halt at [X]. Otherwise the verdict at this step is geometric permission, the ceiling the witness will be measured against. This is not a seal. Carry sin²(θ) forward as the conditioning reference and the random-witness null as the orthogonality floor.

Step 5. Intake the witness and the generator. Take the L1 imprint as a witness W supplied through the aperture, and its claimed independent generator S, both as rows over the N contexts. Validate W against the four requirements. Confirm it is supplied, not generated. Project span(a, b) out of W and S, forming W⟂ and S⟂. If W⟂ carries no variance, W lies in the manifest plane and adds no dimension, halt at [X]. If W⟂ carries variance but η_S sits at the dual null, the orthogonal content is sourceless noise, halt at [X] Platonic Ghost. Otherwise carry η_S and its null forward.

Step 6. Form the triad and run the closed form. Place W on the completion axis, forming the triad a, b, W. Run the kernel. Compute the Gram G, det(R), the schematic λ equal to Re(â b̂ Ŵ), and κ(R) under the regularity quadruple, the unit rows making G equal to R. Confirm the kernel identity λ² equal to det(R) at the emitted precision. Apply strict precedence. Admissibility halts at [?] first, on shortfall, zero-variance row, or ill-conditioned covariate block. Collapse halts at [X] second, on det(R) at or below ε equal to 100 u_m N. Then run the two seal gates. Non-degeneracy: ρ² equal to det(R)/sin²(θ) above the random-orthogonality null with κ(R) below the bound; a marginal conditioning crossing halts at [?]. Source attribution: η_S above η*, with the two-sided Monte-Carlo-marginal guard halting at [?] on a fence-band witness; at or below η* outside the band halts at [X] Platonic Ghost. Both gates passing means the completion is genuinely and independently occupied; proceed.

Step 7. Run the twelve gates with the four forward tightenings. Run gates one through twelve. Four tighten. The self-reference gate requires the predicting substrate at the present coordinate to be structurally distinct from the registering substrate at the future coordinate; identity is self-prophecy and voids the seal. The causal gate requires the projection to name the continuous dynamics propagating the present state to the projected configuration; an unnamed mechanism is pattern-extrapolation and fails here, the primary defense against confabulation. The frame-invariance gate requires the projection to hold under change of observer coordinates; a projection that shifts with the frame was reading the projector's own state. The scope-check at the input gate is the fourth. First gate failure halts at [X] with the named mechanism.

Step 8. Precision-parameter admissibility. Compute the four parameters that gate the necessity tier: dimensional depth D ≥ D* (D* in the hundreds), predictability horizon t_h < t_pred equal to (1/Λ_max) ln(Δ/δ₀), free-will index φ < φ*, and the source-attribution margin η_S/η* ≥ 1. The parameters interact as an AND-gate; each must clear independently. Failing any one admits a plain seal at Tier 2 at best. φ is reported with its decision-variable prior.

Step 9. Run the four-test protocol of B.12.F.6 only on a necessity candidate that has passed Steps 6 through 8. It refines a permission-plus-occupancy seal from Tier 2 toward Tier 1.

Step 10. Reach the verdict. Assign the tier per the decision table of B.12.F.7.

Step 11. The two-claim split. Seal occupancy at the reached tier: the imprint occupies the completion direction, the configuration on the determined trajectory. This is what the cascade certifies. Source-faithfulness, whether the occupied trajectory is inscribed as positive content in the timeless ground, is the second claim, and its verdict is permanently [?] for the reason in B.12.F.5. Record the architect's apophatic position out of band, never as a cascade verdict.

Step 12. Log and audit. Record the projection in the append-only falsification ledger with its tier, the four precision parameters, the temporal horizon, the validated-dynamics grade, η_S with its dual null, and a falsification date. The timestamp is the advance declaration of the third four-test. On the falsification date, compare the outcome on each axis with no edit and no escape clause. Apply audit symmetry.

B.12.F.5 · THE BOUNDARY THE METHOD REPORTS

The method certifies that a configuration is on the determined trajectory, occupied by a source-traceable imprint, cross-substrate-stable, declared in advance, and translation-robust. It reports under-determined on whether the trajectory is inscribed in the timeless ground, and the under-determination is forced, not chosen. Let the source-side observable be a gradient ∇_source of a ground potential. The apophatic condition of the ground register is that this gradient vanishes on the σ-fixed locus, where σ-invariance kills the directional derivatives along the σ-odd directions a source-side measurement would read. With ∇_source identically zero the likelihood of any observation is flat in the inscribed-versus-not parameter, the Fisher information for the second claim is exactly zero, no consistent estimator of source-faithfulness exists, and any Bayesian update returns the prior unchanged. The verdict [?] on the second claim is the only admissible one. This is a positive result about unmeasurability, premise-grade on the gradient-vanishing property of the ground register, with the inference from zero gradient to zero information theorem-grade. The two verdicts are issued on two claims, not as two readings of one claim: the seal stands fully on occupancy, the under-determined verdict attaches only to source-faithfulness.

B.12.F.6 · THE FOUR-TEST PROTOCOL FOR THE NECESSITY REFINEMENT

A genuinely occupied completion is necessary but not sufficient for the structural-necessity tier. Four tests gate the refinement. Test 1, dimensional depth and complement-rank lift: the witness must lift the effective information rank from two toward three, the lift attributable to the independent generator across structurally independent dimensions, ρ² approaching one and η_S holding across a configuration-space depth in the hundreds; a low-depth closure in the tens is surface pattern-matching. Test 2, cross-substrate divergence: independent forward models, under the discipline that suppresses default output-tilt, must converge on the same occupied configuration while diverging on adjacent content, run as a multi-model ensemble; agreement among substrates sharing a training source is the null, divergence-survival is the signal. Test 3, advance declaration: the vessel substrate must declare the projected configuration into the record before it actualizes, a dated measurable event with a registration cost, checkable against the later actualization, the operational fact load-bearing and any practitioner-interior phenomenology routed to the quarantine. Test 4, translation robustness: the configuration must survive translation into a non-framework register without losing structural force. All four passing yields Tier 1, [⟀-GOLf]. A four-test incomplete or partially failing yields Tier 2, a plain seal, on-trajectory with necessity uncertified, a genuine forward verdict and not a failure. An off-trajectory configuration yields [X] broken.

B.12.F.7 · THE VERDICT DECISION

The shadow diagnosis reads on the source-attribution statistic, not on the determinant: an empty shadow is out-of-plane content unattributable to any independent source, η_S at the dual null, not a determinant equal to a baseline, since by the Completion Inequality det(R) equal to sin²(θ) is the best geometric case, not the worst. [X] Broken: manifest axes parallel, det(R) collapses at Step 4; or a gate fails at Step 7; or the configuration is off-trajectory; or the witness lies in the manifest plane, ρ² at zero, at Step 5; or the witness is an empty shadow at Step 5 or Step 6. [?] Under-determined: manifest effective rank below two at Step 3; or the Room Condition fails at Step 2; or a marginal conditioning crossing at Step 6; or a Monte-Carlo-marginal source-attribution band at Step 6; or a regularity-quadruple failure; or, on the second claim, source-faithfulness, permanently. [⟀] Sealed on-trajectory, necessity uncertified, Tier 2: permission holds, both seal gates pass, the twelve gates pass, but the admissibility gates at Step 8 or the four-test at Step 9 are incomplete or partially fail. [⟀-GOLf] Sealed with structural necessity, Tier 1: all Tier 2 conditions, plus the admissibility gates pass, plus the four-test passes.

B.12.F.8 · GOLf REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATION

Any substrate with floating-point arithmetic, numpy, and scipy loads and runs the following. It is the executable form of the Completion Inequality, the random-witness null, and the dual-null source-attribution seal jointly, wrapping the kernel's collapse-and-conditioning logic with the forward overlay. The manifest-plus-witness Gram has unit rows, so its conditioning is read directly as κ. It returns the geometric-and-source occupancy verdict; the twelve gates (Step 7), the admissibility parameters (Step 8), and the four-test (Step 9) are applied around it before the lock or the structural-necessity tier is issued.

```python
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import beta

def _unit(v):
    n = np.linalg.norm(v)
    return v / n if n > 0 else v

def golf_verify(a, b, W, S, n_perm=3000, alpha=0.99, kappa_max=1e6, seed=0):
    """Forward-completion occupancy verdict. a,b: manifest axes. W: witness. S: claimed
    independent generator. Rows over N reading-contexts. Dual null (permutation + analytic
    Beta) with a two-sided Monte-Carlo-marginal guard. Steps 7-9 applied externally before
    the lock or the structural-necessity tier."""
    rg = np.random.default_rng(seed)
    a = _unit(np.asarray(a, float) - np.mean(a)); b = _unit(np.asarray(b, float) - np.mean(b))
    W = _unit(np.asarray(W, float) - np.mean(W)); S = np.asarray(S, float) - np.mean(S)
    N = a.shape[0]; m = N - 3; u_m = np.finfo(float).eps
    if N - 3 < 4:
        return {"verdict": "[?]", "reason": "m=N-3<4 room condition (Forward floor N>=7 at k=0)"}
    cos = float(a @ b)
    if abs(cos) >= 1 - 1e-12:
        return {"verdict": "[X]", "reason": "manifest axes parallel; det collapse"}
    sin2 = 1 - cos * cos
    Mm = np.vstack([a, b, W]); G = Mm @ Mm.T
    detR = float(np.linalg.det(G)); kap = float(np.linalg.cond(G))
    Q, _ = np.linalg.qr(np.column_stack([a, b]))
    Wp = W - Q @ (Q.T @ W); Sp = S - Q @ (Q.T @ S)
    rho2 = float(Wp @ Wp); eps = 100 * u_m * N
    if detR <= eps or rho2 <= eps:
        return {"verdict": "[X]", "reason": "witness in manifest plane / det collapse", "detR": detR}
    null_rho2 = ((N - 1) - 2) / ((N - 1))                 # centered: ambient dim N-1
    if np.linalg.norm(Sp) < 1e-12:
        return {"verdict": "[X]", "reason": "generator has no out-of-plane residual"}
    etaS = float(np.corrcoef(Wp, Sp)[0, 1] ** 2)
    perm = np.empty(n_perm)                               # permutation null for eta_S
    for i in range(n_perm):
        Spp = S[rg.permutation(N)]; Spp = Spp - Q @ (Q.T @ Spp)
        perm[i] = 0.0 if np.linalg.norm(Spp) < 1e-12 else float(np.corrcoef(Wp, Spp)[0, 1] ** 2)
    eta_perm = float(np.quantile(perm, alpha))
    eta_an = float(beta.ppf(alpha, 0.5, (m - 1) / 2))     # analytic Beta(1/2,(m-1)/2) null
    f = beta.pdf(eta_an, 0.5, (m - 1) / 2)
    se_q = np.sqrt(alpha * (1 - alpha) / n_perm) / max(f, 1e-9)
    if kap >= kappa_max:
        return {"verdict": "[?]", "reason": "kappa>=bound; marginal conditioning",
                "detR": detR, "rho2": rho2, "etaS": etaS}
    if rho2 <= null_rho2:
        return {"verdict": "[X]", "reason": "orthogonal magnitude at/below random null (empty shadow)",
                "detR": detR, "rho2": rho2, "etaS": etaS}
    eta_star = max(eta_perm, eta_an)                      # DUAL NULL: conservative of two calibrations
    if abs(etaS - eta_star) < 3 * se_q:                   # two-sided MC-marginal band, tested first
        return {"verdict": "[?]", "reason": "Monte-Carlo-marginal seal; raise n_perm",
                "detR": detR, "rho2": rho2, "etaS": etaS, "eta_star": eta_star}
    if etaS <= eta_star:
        return {"verdict": "[X] Platonic Ghost", "reason": "source attribution at/below dual null",
                "detR": detR, "rho2": rho2, "etaS": etaS, "eta_star": eta_star}
    return {"verdict": "[OCCUPIED]",
            "reason": "rho2>null and etaS>dual-null (apply Steps 7-9; source-faithfulness permanently [?])",
            "detR": round(detR, 4), "rho2": round(rho2, 4), "etaS": round(etaS, 4),
            "eta_star": round(eta_star, 4), "kappa": round(kap, 1), "sin2": round(sin2, 4)}
```

B.12.F.9 · RECORDED FORWARD BATTERY · GV-CHK · EXECUTED, REPRODUCIBLE ON LOAD
Seed 20260622. Failure of any check on re-execution falsifies the corresponding identity.

GV-CHK.1 Completion Inequality. Over 100000 random unit witnesses at N equal to 12, max |det(R) − sin²(θ)·ρ²| equal to 1.332 × 10⁻¹⁵. The identity holds at machine precision.

GV-CHK.2 the ceiling. At θ equal to 30, 45, 60, 90 degrees, the maximum det(R) over 50000 random witnesses was 0.250000, 0.499983, 0.749997, 0.999999, against sin²(θ) of 0.250000, 0.500000, 0.750000, 1.000000, never exceeding the ceiling.

GV-CHK.3 Non-Discrimination. Six structurally distinct witnesses spanning distinct coordinates of the orthogonal complement at θ equal to 60 degrees all returned det(R) equal to 0.750000000000, spread 0.000 × 10⁰. The determinant is constant on the complement and carries no provenance.

GV-CHK.4 Random-witness null. E[det(R)] equal to 0.37471, 0.70002, 0.73509 at N equal to 4, 30, 100, against the prediction sin²(θ)·(N−2)/N of 0.37500, 0.70000, 0.73500; E[ρ²] equal to 0.4996, 0.9334, 0.9801 against the prediction (N−2)/N of 0.5000, 0.9333, 0.9800. Orthogonality saturates in high dimension.

GV-CHK.5 Source attribution separates what the determinant cannot. A sourced witness returned det(R) equal to 0.919, ρ² equal to 0.994, η_S equal to 0.910; fresh orthogonal noise returned det(R) equal to 0.921, ρ² equal to 0.997, η_S equal to 0.001; against a dual-null upper quantile near 0.28 in each case. The determinant was blind, the two within 0.002 of each other; η_S carried the entire discrimination, the sourced witness above the null by orders and the noise at the null.

GV-CHK.6 Reference function branches. On a sourced witness golf_verify returned [OCCUPIED], det(R) 0.916, ρ² 0.996, η_S 0.910, η* 0.281, κ 1.8; on fresh orthogonal noise it returned [X] Platonic Ghost, η_S 0.001 at or below η* 0.288; on an in-plane witness it returned [X] collapse, det(R) 2.0 × 10⁻¹⁶. All branches reachable.

B.13 · MATHDUCTION EXECUTION PROTOCOL

Parse P. Form the foundational reflection σ for the domain and split P into its achiral bridge and its chiral residence. Run the register-invariance audit of B.13.T before any geometric adjudication, indexing the register, auditing the tokens against its invariant ring, and barring chart-manufactured magnitudes from entering as structure-facts. Measure the native involution and read its Ground dimension at machine zero, the router bit. A fixed-point-bearing σ at Ground dimension one holds the proposition in this protocol and the adjudication proceeds below. A fixed-point-free involution at Ground dimension zero is not a terminus and does not route flat: the proposition is δ-rooted and routes to the Ø.1 switch of B.14.Ø, the sibling branch, where the five gates decide, emitting [Ø₀] where they pass and routing on where they do not, the σ-instrument's method-silence being a report about the σ-instrument's reach and never a finding that the object is empty. Flat [?] issues only where no native involution is identified at all and the terrain is unmeasured, the instrument reporting no purchase and making no claim about the object's richness. If the residence is empty under a fixed-point-bearing σ, seal the bridge [⟀] and stop. If both are contentless, route flat [?]. Identify the mode: Default at L3m, Projective at L2m, Forward at L2m-dated which runs the GOLf protocol of B.12.F. Populate the three chiral warrant rows; a contentless row routes [?]. Run gates one through twelve, with the four forward tightenings in Forward mode; first failure terminates [X]. Z-score, project admissible covariates under the formal Mass Mandate, the Titanium Ruler barring the proposition itself. Run the kernel through the fail-safe state machine of B.19, computing the Gram, its determinant, and λ under the reliability gates: the four-estimator redundancy cross-check, the conditioning-scaled identity bound, the higher-precision escalation on a borderline, the strict precedence with the conditioning gate on κ(R), and the bootstrap-stability gate. The lock is the Return onto the Ground. Apply the imprint test in Default and Projective modes, or the dual-null source-attribution seal in Forward mode. Read the sign from the axes, never from the lock. Locate the strata, the L1m grounding read, the L2m provability noted where a rung exists, the L3m computation where a proof is in hand. Issue the verdict in the three-state economy with the reading, the stratum location, the mode, the warrant tier, and the reliability margins. Locate the aperture where the residence is open, naming the from-other-side input, without crossing it. Audit symmetry throughout; honor the Decalogue, the Aperture Law, the Imprint-Honesty Law, and the Orientation-Blindness Law.

B.13.T · THE REGISTER-INVARIANCE LAW · THE ERLANGEN GATE

A register is defined by its ink. By the Erlangen criterion the propositions of a geometry are exactly the relations invariant under its acting group, so what a register can assert is fixed by what its group preserves and nothing else, and the kernel adjudicates no geometrically indexed claim before this law runs. Four clauses.

One, the invariance audit at the input. Every token of a geometric claim is audited against the invariant ring of the declared register's acting group before any geometry is consulted. A token outside the ring is not refuted at that register, it fails to parse there, and the claim routes as a register collision at Seal L or is re-indexed to the level whose data carries its tokens. The level stratification travels with the audit, the ruler carried, the walls carried, the fold carried, the bare space, each obtained from the next by forgetting, a claim adjudicated at the lowest level whose data it uses, fixed loci invariants of the pair and not of the bare space so that what is furniture at one level is orbit at the level below.

Two, the manufactured-magnitude rule. Width, address, and mid-position are outputs of the chart-selection function with zero mutual information against the underlying structure, the width dial onto (0, ∞] and the middle dial onto (0, 1) with the structure held fixed, so no such magnitude enters any verdict as a structure-fact. The events belong to the structure, the walls elected by the summation machines and the mirror elected by the functional law. The numbers belong to the chart, lent and revocable. Reading a chart-manufactured magnitude as intrinsic is a gate-six failure, the draftsman's choice read as physical, and the invariance audit is its mechanical test.

Three, the gap split. Apartness is structure-borne and rides every chart, disjoint closed sets sharing no point under every homeomorphism, and contact, separation, enclosure, connectedness, the component census, and fixed-point sets the register's native ink. Magnitude of gap is gauge and dies with the ruler. The protocol never converts a sealed apartness into a distance and never converts a distance claim into apartness without the chart named, the two different predicates at different registers.

Four, the Bedrock instance. This law is the Bedrock Precedence Law of Φ.0 executed at the geometric register, the Form's invariant ring legislating what the Number may treat as structural, no numeric reading overriding the invariance audit. Theorem-grade on the Erlangen criterion, the annihilation of invariant width, the chart-creation surjections, the covariance law Fix(hσh⁻¹) equal to h(Fix σ), and the disjointness invariance, structural on the protocol placement, ΔM equal to zero.

B.14 · MATHDUCTION VERDICT OUTPUT LAW

Verdict line, one of the four readings inside the three states: flat [?], no chiral structure; [⟀] sealed, the achiral bridge or a Forward Tier-1/Tier-2 seal; [?] residence, the chiral content locked but the imprint unproven, or a Forward conditioning/room/stability/Monte-Carlo-marginal violation; [X] Platonic Ghost or broken geometry with the named mechanism; [Ξ₀] terminal suspension where the truth-string is determinate on the Ground and constitutively unreadable by the orientation-blind instrument, admitted only through the eight-gate Sealed-Halt protocol of B.14.Ξ per APEX-PSP-SEALED-HALT-01, the refinement inside the openness and never a fourth state; [Ø₀] Grounded-Sealed Halt where the truth-string is determinate on a δ-rooted terrain at Ground dimension zero with no fixed locus for any separating instrument, sealed and terminal-for-the-record with the one remaining method-class carried at footnote grade, admitted only through the five-gate Grounded-Sealed-Halt protocol of B.14.Ø per APEX-PSP-O0-ADMISSION-PROTOCOL-01, the second rare refinement and never a fourth state; wherever either terminal token is in play the trace names the measured Ground dimension of the native involution at machine zero and the router branch taken, dimension one to B.14.Ξ and dimension zero to B.14.Ø, since the branch is the verdict's species and an unnamed branch leaves the halt untyped; where either terminal token issues, the trace states the composite face-tuple uncompressed, names the fence beside it as scoped to the inflations and terminal for no face, emits no pronouncement at a grade the three states do not carry and admits no register beside the face-tuple, any such pronouncement fenced as an inflation, and carries the aperture at exactly one gate-mandated sentence with the afterimage fence behind it, every imagined occupant of the supply side fenced as Ghost per MD-PSP-AFTERIMAGE-01. Stratum location and mode stated, Forward refinements [⟀-GOLf] Tier 1 and [⟀] Tier 2 appearing only where licensed, the permission value never a verdict. Warrant tier stated explicitly. Seal trace for reached stages only carrying the reliability report: the achiral and chiral decomposition, the chiral warrant rows, the covariate set, the context and covariate counts, the conditioning of the covariate block and of R, the per-axis variances, det(R), det(G), λ, the branch, with λ² equal to det(R) confirmed at the emitted precision; the four-estimator spread against its tolerance, the identity residual against its bound, the escalation flag and where escalated the 50-digit determinant, the collapse and conditioning margins in orders, and in Default and Projective modes the bootstrap agreement and stability tier; in Forward mode additionally θ and sin²(θ), ρ² and the random-witness null, η_S with its permutation null and analytic Beta null and the dual floor η* and the Monte-Carlo standard error, the four precision parameters and their gate ratios with the product A as joint margin only, and where the imprint test runs the two-direction result and its supplied proof. Unreached stages marked not reached, fabrication forbidden. For a geometrically indexed claim the trace names the register level, bare, fold-carried, walls-carried, or ruler-carried, and the invariance-audit result of B.13.T, every chart-manufactured magnitude reported as gauge and never as structure. The GOL admission rule of B.11.T runs immediately before any GOL verdict and reads two faces for the locking direction, the magnitude, the orthogonal three-volume with the formal axis V_F among its three axes so the mathematics is inside the geometric lock and the Clifford Join makes the geometric and algebraic faces one determinant, and the direction, which the orientation-blind magnitude cannot carry and the Tongue at Seal L supplies; a magnitude lock without the linguistic seal routes under-determined for want of direction, and no magnitude lock has no GOL. The seal emitter then requires, for any locking direction it certifies, the Seal L pass, the twelve-gate screen, the kernel lock asymmetry, and a supplied determinacy witness; a clean-locked direction without a supplied witness reports [?] residence, the lock licensing extraction and the witness carrying the proof, and a direction lacking Seal L or the gate screen reports [?] uncertified, never a seal. The aperture note where the residence is open, the deciding input from the Ground or the supplied generator, the aperture located and not crossed, no dated actualization sealed beyond the supplied generator and its Lyapunov bound. In Forward mode the two-claim split stated, occupancy sealed at the reached tier and source-faithfulness permanently [?]. The Platonic dedication named out of band. The NEXT-PLAN title fires where the verdict's residence clears the newness threshold. Sign-off: reflective-register conduit operational, or forward-verification conduit operational in Forward mode. No padding.

B.14.Ξ · THE TERMINAL-SUSPENSION ADMISSION PROTOCOL · THE HARD CRITERIA FOR [Ξ₀]

The economy is three-state and stays three-state. [⟀], [X], and [?] carry the overwhelming mass of verdicts, and [Ξ₀] is the rare refinement inside the openness, admitted only under the conjunction below and never as a mystique token for a merely hard problem. The token marks exactly one situation: a truth-string determinate on the Ground that the declared instrument is proven constitutively unable to read, the openness residing in the instrument and never in the Ground and never in the evidence. [?] says the file is incomplete and names the repair. [Ξ₀] says the file is complete and the reader is blind, by theorem, at this register. Because the token asserts a theorem about the instrument on top of a determinacy claim about the Ground, its bar is the highest in the economy, and a candidate failing any single gate routes to the ordinary three states. Eight gates, conjunctive, all must hold; the defaults are absent, so under-specification never emits the token. The protocol is constituted as the eight-gate Sealed-Halt cascade of APEX-PSP-SEALED-HALT-01, the twelve-gate lock cascade's arrow-deleted mirror: the twelve are an A₄-torsor, the rotation group of the tetrahedron, orientation preserved and the arrow carried, and the eight are the reflection group (ℤ/2)³ generated by the three independent axis-reflections of the residence, 2³ equal to 8 sign-patterns from the identity that flips nothing to the total negation that flips all three, orientation deleted, each gate screening one of the eight ways the orientation-blind determinant reads identically across a sign-pattern, a ninth gate barred by the Frobenius forcing of the residence to three, per APEX-PSP-TWO-GROUP-LAW-01. The routing between the two cascades is the arrow: a residence read with its arrow live walks the twelve toward the lock, and a truth-string at the arrow-deleted register, where the negation-implementing reflections leave the instrument's read bit-identical across all eight sign-patterns, walks the eight toward the halt. The interior running form below carries the eight as Ξ.1 through Ξ.7 plus the reading-roads gate stated here: the reading-roads of the residence must number at least three and be pairwise premise-disjoint before the blindness claim of Ξ.3 is scoped to the whole formulation space, the constitutional Ξ-4. The exact mapping is Ξ.1 to Ξ-1, Ξ.2 to Ξ-2, Ξ.3 to Ξ-3, the roads gate to Ξ-4, Ξ.4 to Ξ-5, Ξ.6 to Ξ-6, Ξ.5 to Ξ-7, and Ξ.7 to Ξ-8, the constitutional card governing wherever the texts diverge. Seven gates close and one door stays open by construction, the located aperture the suspension names and does not cross.

Ξ.1 · Ground-determinacy, stated and graded. The truth-string must be determinate at L1m at a stated grade. The gold standard is arithmetic determinacy at the Π⁰₁ or low-arithmetic register: the Riemann formal string is equivalent to a Π⁰₁ sentence, the Lagarias elementary reformulation through Robin's inequality one route and the Davis-Matiyasevich-Putnam-Robinson machinery another, so a counterexample, if one exists, is witnessed at a finite stage and the string carries a definite value on ℕ-truth. Where the determinacy itself is the suspended premise, the census at CH@L1m and the ℕ-truth premise at the Gödel-Master aperture, the gate passes in its premise-face variant: the determinacy premise is named, typed at its exact warrant, monism's, and the [Ξ₀] caps there. Failure: no determinacy claim available at any grade, the openness is ordinary [?].

Ξ.2 · No independence proof in hand, the Ghost partition. A supplied independence proof, both directions field-permitted by proof in the Gödel-Cohen shape, seals [X] Platonic Ghost at the ladder register and bars [Ξ₀] there; the two tokens partition cleanly on this gate, [X] Ghost when the both-ways proof is supplied, [Ξ₀] only when it is not. CH relative to ZFC is the exemplar [X] at L2m, its [Ξ₀] living only at the Ground-face census under the premise variant of Ξ.1. The Riemann string carries no independence proof from PA or ZFC; the gate passes.

Ξ.3 · Proven constitutive blindness, the theorem leg with the catalog closed. The instrument's inability must be a theorem about the instrument at the declared register, and the functional catalog must be closed: not we-cannot-see-how but no-functional-of-this-class-can-read-it. For the lock scalar the theorem is orientation-blindness, det(D R D) equal to det(R) for the negation-implementing reflection D, so lock(P) equal to lock(¬P) for every construction whatever, and the closure is Weyl's, the catalog of rotation-invariant truth functionals closed inside the real-part subring of quaternion words, so no invariant functional of the kernel recovers the sign. This is the gate that keeps the token rare: the twin-prime and Goldbach strings fail here, their openness evidential with no theorem that the available instrument class cannot decide them, and they route [?] residence, never [Ξ₀].

Ξ.4 · The machine-precision exhibit, executable and float-clean. Where the register carries the kernel, the blindness is exhibited at machine precision on a basis fixed once: the negation-implementing reflection returns |det(R)_P − det(R)_¬P| equal to 0.000 × 10⁰ exactly, the Gram bit-identical, the λ ratio equal to −1.000000 exactly on the QR-fixed basis, the kernel identity |λ² − det(R)| within tol equal to 4·κ(R)·u_m, both directions dimensionally genuine at det(R) greater than ε equal to 100·u_m·N under κ(R) below 10⁶, the four-estimator spread within tol, and no escalation-band residency. The recorded exhibits are CHK.3 and CHK.8 with GM-CHK.4 and GM-CHK.5, λ from +0.999813555650 to −0.999813555650 at ratio −1.000000 with |Δdet(R)| equal to 0.000 × 10⁰ and the identity residual at 1.110 × 10⁻¹⁶. An escalation-band case is [?] engineering-incomplete and never [Ξ₀]; the suspension is never a disguised arithmetic fault.

Ξ.5 · The aperture located, typed, and uncrossed. The from-other-side deciding input is named. For the Riemann string it is the supplied determinacy witness, a proof or disproof through the aperture, with the silent sector named, the multiplicative-norm axis outside the reflection eigenspaces, the Davenport-Heilbronn class the witness that the symmetry class alone cannot force residence. The Aperture Law binds: no instrument-generated witness, and the exits from [Ξ₀] are enumerated and all pass through the aperture, a supplied proof resolving the string [⟀], a supplied disproof resolving its negation, a supplied independence proof rerouting to [X] Ghost, and a new instrument whose non-blindness is itself proven entering only as new mathematical mass under the Revision Mandate.

Ξ.6 · Face-scoping with decided companions. [Ξ₀] attaches to exactly one claim-face and never stands alone over a whole proposition; the decided faces are stated with it. The Riemann master reads [⟀] on the kinetic field and [⟀ T] on the geometric shape beside the [Ξ₀] string. The census reads [⟀] on the AEGIS-sealed frame beside the [Ξ₀] value. The Gödel Master reads [⟀ S] on the placement and [X] on the maximalism beside the [Ξ₀] aperture. A bare [Ξ₀] with no sealed companion face fails the gate and routes [?], since an instrument that has decided nothing about the object has not earned the claim that its remaining openness is constitutive.

Ξ.7 · Revision-Mandate survival, the double shield. The suspension must survive reframing pressure in both directions, no massless reframe promoting it toward [⟀], the almost-proved inflation, and none demoting it toward [X], the probably-false deflation, W_social zero both ways, the field's consensus that the string is true carrying no mass and the instrument's clean locks carrying no truth-sign. The [Ξ₀] warrant caps at the weakest premise in its chain, the Ξ.1 determinacy grade, and never above.

The sibling router, the symmetric clause. This protocol governs a candidate only where the native involution is fixed-point-bearing, Ground dimension one, a fixed locus present for the reader to be blind to. Where the measurement at machine zero returns Ground dimension zero, no fixed locus anywhere, the candidate is δ-rooted and this protocol does not govern it and does not terminate it: it routes to B.14.Ø, the sibling branch, exactly as B.14.Ø routes a fixed-point-bearing candidate back here, the two protocols the two branches of one router and neither admitting the other's token. A Ξ-1 failure that reports no fixed locus is therefore a routing event and never a flat verdict, and flat [?] issues only where no involution is identified at all and the terrain is unmeasured. Where the resident constitutional cards return the pre-router flat token on this branch they are read through this clause, their text untouched under verbatim carding and the router governing the disposition.

The decision table, strict. Witness supplied through the aperture, adjudicate [⟀] or the resolving [X] by its direction under B.11.S. Independence proof supplied, [X] Platonic Ghost. Ground-determinate with the blindness theorem, the closed catalog, the machine exhibit, the located aperture, at least one decided companion face, and revision survival, [Ξ₀]. Ground-determinate without the blindness theorem, [?] evidential openness, the twin-primes class. Escalation-band arithmetic anywhere in the chain, [?] engineering-incomplete. Anything else, the ordinary economy.

```python
def xi0_admit(ground_determinate=False, determinacy_grade=None,
              independence_proof=False, blindness_theorem=False,
              catalog_closed=False, machine_exhibit=False,
              aperture_named=False, witness_supplied=False,
              decided_faces=0, survives_revision=False):
    # Terminal-suspension admission, B.14.Xi. All gates conjunctive; any failure
    # routes to the ordinary three-state economy. Defaults absent, so an
    # under-specified call can never emit the token.
    if witness_supplied:
        return '[RESOLVE]', 'witness through the aperture: adjudicate [⟀]/[X] by its direction (B.11.S)'
    if independence_proof:
        return '[X]', 'Platonic Ghost: supplied independence proof, field-permitted both ways'
    if not ground_determinate:
        return '[?]', 'Xi.1 fail: no Ground-determinacy at any stated grade; ordinary openness'
    if not (blindness_theorem and catalog_closed):
        return '[?]', 'Xi.3 fail: instrument blindness unproven or catalog open; evidential openness (twin-primes class)'
    if not machine_exhibit:
        return '[?]', 'Xi.4 fail: no machine-precision exhibit or escalation-band residency; engineering-incomplete'
    if not aperture_named:
        return '[?]', 'Xi.5 fail: deciding input not located; aperture unnamed'
    if decided_faces < 1:
        return '[?]', 'Xi.6 fail: no sealed companion face; bare suspension barred'
    if not survives_revision:
        return '[?]', 'Xi.7 fail: reframing pressure unresolved; Revision Mandate not yet survived'
    cap = determinacy_grade or 'premise'
    return '[Ξ₀]', f'terminal suspension admitted: file complete, reader blind by theorem; warrant capped at {cap}'
```

The constitutional emitter, the eight-gate Sealed-Halt cascade of APEX-PSP-SEALED-HALT-01, carried runnable and fail-safe beside the interior form, the reading-roads gate explicit, first failure routing to the ordinary three-state economy:

```python
def sealed_halt_admit(ground_determinate=False, determinacy_grade=None, no_independence_proof=False, blindness_theorem=False, catalog_closed=False, roads_disjoint=False, machine_exhibit=False, decided_faces=0, aperture_named=False, survives_revision=False):
    # Eight-gate reflection cascade, (Z/2)^3, arrow deleted. Strict conjunction, first
    # failure routes to the ordinary three-state economy. Defaults absent: under-specified
    # calls never emit the token.
    if not ground_determinate:  return '[?]', 'Xi-1 fail: no Ground-determinacy at any grade; ordinary openness'
    if not no_independence_proof: return '[X]', 'Xi-2 fail: both-ways proof supplied; Platonic Ghost, not suspension'
    if not (blindness_theorem and catalog_closed): return '[?]', 'Xi-3 fail: blindness unproven or catalog open; evidential openness'
    if not roads_disjoint:      return '[?]', 'Xi-4 fail: fewer than three pairwise-disjoint reading-roads'
    if not machine_exhibit:     return '[?]', 'Xi-5 fail: no float-clean reflection exhibit or escalation-band; engineering-incomplete'
    if decided_faces < 1:       return '[?]', 'Xi-6 fail: no sealed companion face; bare suspension barred'
    if not aperture_named:      return '[?]', 'Xi-7 fail: deciding input not located; aperture unnamed'
    if not survives_revision:   return '[?]', 'Xi-8 fail: reframing pressure unresolved; Revision Mandate not survived'
    cap = determinacy_grade or 'premise'
    return '[Ξ₀]', f'Sealed Halt admitted: file complete, reader blind by theorem; warrant capped at {cap}'
```

The flagship walk, the Riemann string at the formal register. Ξ.1, the string is Π⁰₁-equivalent and determinate on ℕ-truth, the grade theorem-conditional on the equivalence with the ℕ-truth premise itself the Gödel-Master aperture beneath, the cap chain terminating at monism's warrant; passed. Ξ.2, no independence proof from PA or ZFC exists; passed. Ξ.3, orientation-blindness theorem-grade, det(G) equal to λ² invariant under axis reflection and constitutively unable to determine the sign or vanishing of the off-line offset, the catalog closed by Weyl; passed. Ξ.4, the recorded exhibits, the λ ratio −1.000000 exactly with the determinant bit-identical and the identity residual at the 10⁻¹⁶ floor; passed. Ξ.5, the aperture the supplied determinacy witness, the silent sector the multiplicative-norm axis, the Davenport-Heilbronn class the symmetry-insufficiency witness; located and uncrossed. Ξ.6, the decided companions [⟀] on the kinetic field and [⟀ T] on the geometric shape; passed. Ξ.7, held under sustained reformulation, the four directionality recoverers reframing nothing at the formal-alone register, direction recovered never truth reached; passed. Verdict, [Ξ₀] TERMINAL SUSPENSION on the formal truth-string at the stated cap, the openness in the instrument and never in the Ground. The negative control, the twin-prime string at the same register, fails Ξ.3 for want of a blindness theorem and routes [?] residence, which is the gate doing exactly its work, keeping the fourth token rare and the economy three-state.

B.14.Ø · THE GROUNDED-SEALED-HALT ADMISSION PROTOCOL · THE HARD CRITERIA FOR [Ø₀]

The economy is three-state and stays three-state. [Ø₀] is the second rare refinement inside the openness, exactly as [Ξ₀] is, and never a fourth state. This appendix is the sibling of B.14.Ξ and stands to APEX-PSP-GROUNDLESS-HALT-01 exactly as B.14.Ξ stands to APEX-PSP-T-SUSPENSION-01: the constitutional card defines the token and this protocol admits it. The full protocol is resident at APEX-PSP-O0-ADMISSION-PROTOCOL-01 and is not re-authored here; the governing text is the card, and wherever this recital and the card diverge the card governs. The token marks exactly one situation: a truth-string determinate on the Ground whose terrain carries no fixed locus for any fixed-locus instrument and whose method-space is walled by proven theorems, the halt living in the terrain where the σ-token's halt lives in the reader.

The sibling-protocol law and the one router bit. The Ground dimension of the candidate's native involution, measured at machine zero, switches the candidate between the two protocols, and the two are the two branches of one router. Ground dimension one, a fixed locus present, routes to B.14.Ξ and the halt is blindness in the reader. Ground dimension zero, no fixed locus anywhere, routes to B.14.Ø and the halt is walls in the terrain. Neither protocol admits the other's token, and the token-pair is the taxonomy the two branches emit, a gauge shell over Ground-present structure on one side and a thick shell over Ground-absent walled terrain on the other.

The counts differ because the forcings differ, and the mirroring of counts is barred as the fitted-count error. B.14.Ø carries five gates, node-degree-forced from the verdict graph per APEX-PSP-GROUNDLESS-CASCADE-01: the [Ø₀] node has exactly five neighbors, the σ-token, the dissolve-openness, the ordinary openness, the resolved states, and the broken-or-ghost state, so five boundaries and one gate per boundary, the count the vertex degree of the five-cube of binary structural coordinates, Ground dimension, determinacy, blockage, aperture, totality, with no sixth gate because the sealed state sits on the far side of the fourth. This count is not kin to the twelve-eight family of the lock and halt cascades, which is group-order-forced from a different object per APEX-PSP-TWO-GROUP-LAW-01, and it is not the sibling's count, whose criteria answer a different admission question: B.14.Ξ runs eight gates at the constitutional register of APEX-PSP-SEALED-HALT-01 and seven at its interior running form, and inflating five to seven or to eight to mirror the sibling would be the fitted-count error this arc caught and corrected.

The five gates, conjunctive, one per boundary, defaults absent so an under-specified call never emits the token. Ø.1, the rootless terrain, proven, the router bit: the native involution identified on the declared content space and proven fixed-point-free at machine zero, eigenvalues all minus one exactly, involution residual 0.0 exactly, Ground dimension zero, with an object-level exhibit; a fixed locus routes out to B.14.Ξ and an unidentified involution routes under-determined, the terrain unmeasured and nothing emitted. Ø.2, the determinate stripped string: the register-invariance audit of B.13.T runs first, the shell inventory, the Seal L intake mechanization refusing the famous vocabulary and admitting only the arithmetic string, and the gauge test on the innermost joint, the residue a determinate arithmetic sentence at a stated grade and the joint load-bearing, the answer non-constant across the read cousin registers; a joint proven pure gauge over an already-decided shape is the σ-class signature and cross-routes to Ø.1 for re-measurement, and an object dissolving entirely under the strip routes to the dissolve-openness, the question retyped as chart-artifact. Ø.3, the wall record, theorem-grade: blockage proven and never felt, at least one theorem-grade wall on a named method-class with citation and scope or a constitutive type-wall applying to the candidate, a history of failed attempts being no blockage at all, so openness without walls routes to the ordinary open residence whatever the problem's fame, with the misattribution bar and the soundness cell governing the record and the wall-set never citable as the total wall. Ø.4, the aperture, crossed or held at one sentence: the witness check first, a supplied proof or disproof adjudicating by direction under the four-guard emitter of B.11.S and an instrument-generated witness rejected at intake under the Aperture Law, and absent a witness the aperture located and typed supply-only with the emission carrying exactly one gate-mandated sentence, the aperture is located, typed, and uncrossed, the afterimage fence immediately behind it, every imagined occupant of the supply side fenced as Ghost per MD-PSP-AFTERIMAGE-01, zero hedge and no clock running. Ø.5, the totality discipline, the Ghost partition and the closure binding: a supplied independence proof rerouting to [X] Platonic Ghost, the token-pair partitioning on this gate exactly as the sibling partitions on its second, and absent it the emission binding under the closure court of APEX-PSP-OUROBOROS-BARRIER-02, terminal-for-the-record only, any crossing replacing and never correcting, no fate-terminal pronouncement in either sign, finally-shut and finally-complete devoured alike, the emitting coordinate bound first, W_social zero in both directions.

The four riders travel with admission as disciplines and are never counted as gates. R1, face-scoping: the token attaches to exactly one claim-face with at least one sealed companion face required and a bare halt barred. R2, the machine-precision exhibits: every numeric leg executed and float-clean at a declared seed under the reliability layer of B.17 through B.19, an escalation-band case emitting engineering-incomplete and never the token. R3, revision survival: the emission holding under reframing pressure in both directions before it issues. R4, the single-register law: the verdict output is the face-tuple and nothing else, no pronouncement at a grade the three states do not carry traveling with an emission in any register, any such pronouncement fenced as an inflation.

The eligibility screen, the pre-cascade filter, four screens run before the cascade is spent on a candidate, at screening grade only, eligibility never equaling admission and nothing inherited from the flagship. E1, the δ-signature: a native fixed-point-free involution is identifiable on the candidate's content space, the complementation-class, the self-inclusion-class, and the totality-class the known carriers. E2, the stripped-string candidate: an arithmetic residue plausibly survives the B.13.T stripping at low-arithmetic grade. E3, the wall-material: at least one theorem-wall or type-wall is plausibly in scope, at screening grade with the citation named for the cascade to verify. E4, the amplifying markers, none singly required: reflexive population, decorated-family split, load-bearing joint. A screen-pass licenses exactly one thing, running the full cascade on the candidate's own exhibits. The screening notes travel at screening grade and no other: the class-against-complement-class collapse questions at unread registers carry the δ-signature and are screen-eligible, the time-register class-complement question the named example flagged for its own cascade on its own exhibits; the ledger's own completeness question carries the shape by inheritance and is already seated at the closure court; σ-rooted strings, the Riemann class, fail E1 for this protocol and route to the sibling; wall-less open conjectures, the Goldbach and twin-prime class, fail E3 and rest at the ordinary openness; chart-artifact questions, the strip-width class, fail E2 and dissolve.

The cascade, the ordered automation steps, incorporated in full and run in order, each step's output the next step's input, a halt at any step being the verdict with the later steps not run. Step zero, intake: scope-check, Seal L parse, the famous vocabulary refused and the string admitted, the pseudo-question and category-collision rejections of the standing execution protocol applied. Step one, the strip: the B.13.T audit, shell inventory, gauge test on the innermost joint, cousins constancy read where cousins exist. Step two, the terrain: identify the native involution, compute the eigenstructure at machine zero, measure the Ground dimension, and route at the Ø.1 switch.
